description:
Tirnu is an Embedded Banking and Digital Asset platform where users connect multiple bank accounts, invest in tokenized and crypto assets, and grow their income while tracking spending in real time through automated categorization and actionable insights.




We’re bridging traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi) by enabling users to interact with both fiat and blockchain ecosystems through a single, secure interface.




Position Overview: Full Stack Developer (Node.js / TypeScript)




We are seeking an experienced Full Stack Developer with deep expertise in Node.js, TypeScript, and blockchain integration to join our growing engineering team. In this role, you will design, build, and maintain key components of our fintech and crypto infrastructure — powering seamless experiences across banking, tokenized investments, and digital asset management.




Your strong background in AWS, NoSQL databases, and Git, combined with hands-on experience in crypto APIs, wallet management, or blockchain data processing, will be essential for delivering scalable, high-performance, and secure solutions.




Experience with Elasticsearch, microservices, and Web3 integration is highly desirable and will be considered a strong advantage.




Key Responsibilities




 * Architect, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack and blockchain-integrated applications using Node.js and TypeScript, adhering to clean code principles and industry best practices.
 * Design and implement efficient, secure, and maintainable backend services and APIs using AWS (EC2, Lambda, API Gateway, etc.).
 * Build and manage crypto-related services, including wallet connections, blockchain data indexing, transaction tracking, and tokenized asset modules.
 * Work with NoSQL databases such as MongoDB or DynamoDB, optimizing for performance, scalability, and data integrity.
 * Collaborate closely with frontend engineers to deliver seamless, responsive user experiences using modern web technologies.
 * Manage the codebase through Git and participate in CI/CD pipelines to ensure robust and efficient development workflows.
 * Integrate Elasticsearch for high-performance search capabilities and scalable data access.
 * Design and implement services using microservices and Web3 architecture to enhance modularity, flexibility, and blockchain interoperability.
 * Proactively troubleshoot, debug, and optimize performance across the entire stack and blockchain layers.
 * Stay abreast of new technologies in fintech and crypto including smart contracts, DeFi protocols, and Web3 frameworks to continuously drive innovation.




Qualifications




 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
 * 3+ years of hands-on experience as a Full Stack Developer with a strong focus on Node.js and TypeScript.
 * Experience working with blockchain technologies, crypto APIs (e.g., Ethereum, Polygon, Bitcoin, Solana), or digital asset custody/wallet systems (e.g., Fireblocks, Web3.js, Ethers.js).
 * Advanced proficiency in AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, API Gateway, and related infrastructure.
 * Solid experience with NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, DynamoDB), including schema design and performance tuning.
 * Proficient in using Git for source control and experienced in working within agile, collaborative development environments.
 * Experience with Elasticsearch and familiarity with microservices and Web3-based architectures is highly desirable.
 * Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills with a proactive and solution-oriented mindset.
 * Excellent communication and teamwork abilities, with a passion for building secure, compliant, and innovative fintech–crypto solutions in a fast-paced environment.




Join Us




If you're a seasoned developer passionate about fintech, blockchain, and digital assets, and ready to redefine how people interact with money, we’d love to hear from you. Join a collaborative, innovation-driven team where your contributions directly shape the future of embedded finance and crypto in Europe.




Apply now and become part of Tirnu’s mission to connect banking, blockchain, and opportunity.

description:
SoftNEP is a leading web design company in Nepal that provides innovative solutions for web development, mobile applications, e-commerce, web hosting and digital marketing. We are looking for a creative and talented Web Designer to join our team and help us create amazing websites for our clients.

As a Web Designer at SoftNEP, you will be responsible for:


 * Designing website templates and banners that are attractive, user-friendly, and responsive.
 * Creating the look, layout and features of a website using front-end languages like HTML, CSS and Javascript.
 * Developing and maintaining consistent branding across all web pages and platforms.
 * Collaborating with UX, marketing, engineering and other teams to ensure the website meets the client's needs and expectations.
 * Providing internal support and external customer service throughout the build and launch process of the website.
   
   

To be a successful Web Designer at SoftNEP, you need to have:


 * At least 2 years of experience in web design or a related field.
 * A portfolio of previous web design projects that demonstrate your creativity and skills.
 * Proficiency in front-end languages like HTML, CSS and Javascript.
 * Knowledge of web design tools and software such as Photoshop, Illustrator, Dreamweaver, etc.
 * Ability to handle multiple projects and tasks at the same time and meet deadlines.
 * Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.
   
   

Services


 * Web Design & UX
 * Software Development
 * Mobile App Development
 * Web App Development
 * Digital Marketing
 * Search Engine Optimization
 * Social Media Marketing

description:
Job Description

About Leapfrog

Leapfrog is on a mission to be a role-model technology company. Since 2010, we have been relentlessly focused on crafting world-class digital products with our team of exceptional engineers. We specialize in building high-quality SaaS solutions and have partnered with over 100 global clients, delivering impactful products through our expertise in emerging technologies.

We’re thinkers and doers, creatives and coders, makers and builders— but most importantly, we are trusted partners with world-class engineers. Hundreds of companies in Boston, Seattle, Silicon Valley, and San Francisco choose us to gain speed, agility, quality, and stability, giving them an edge over their competitors.

About The Role

We are looking for a Full-Stack Engineer with exposure to Generative AI to join our engineering team. In this role, you will work on building scalable applications while also contributing to the integration of GenAI-driven features that enhance product capabilities. You will collaborate on architectural decisions, support AI-assisted functionalities, and help the team stay aligned with emerging AI technologies. This is a great opportunity for someone strong in full-stack engineering who is also interested in applying GenAI in practical, real-world use cases.


 * Design and develop robust full-stack applications using modern frameworks with a focus on performance, scalability, and security.
 * Collaborate on architectural decisions involving application design, cloud services, and AI-assisted features.
 * Implement and support light to moderate GenAI integrations (e.g., integrating LLM APIs, building prompt workflows, handling embeddings, basic vector search, or AI-powered UI components).
 * Driving technical projects and providing leadership in an innovative and fast-paced environment
 * Lead, motivate and mentor team members in achieving project and organizational goals
 * Actively involved in improving organizational culture, process, and standards
 * Provide thought leadership and strengthen the team’s software engineering capabilities
 * Stay current with trends in full-stack development and evolving GenAI tools/frameworks.
   
   

Job requirements


 * 4+ years of professional experience in software development with 1+ years in a leadership or mentoring capacity.
 * 2+ years of experience in React and Node.js (or equivalent full-stack technologies).
 * Expert-level knowledge of architectural principles, design patterns, data structures, and algorithms.
 * Advanced knowledge of relational and non-relational databases
 * Strong understanding of architectural principles, design patterns, data structures, and algorithms.
 * Experience with both relational and NoSQL databases.
 * Familiarity with DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, automated testing, and code quality best practices.
 * Experience with cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, or GCP) and cloud-native application development.
 * Exposure to AI-assisted feature development or willingness to work on GenAI components.
 * Experience working in agile teams.
 * Excellent communication, analytical, and problem-solving skills.
 * Customer-oriented mindset with a passion for building modern, intelligent applications.
 * Bachelor’s in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
   
   

Nice to have


 * Proficiency in one or more languages: Python, Golang, Java
 * Experience with SaaS products
 * Experience with AWS techs like EC2, EBS, S3, SNS, RDS, Lambda, and Faregate
 * Experience with containerization such as Docker, Kubernetes
 * Experience with EHR integration, Redox, FHIR, HL7
   
   

🌞 Life At Leapfrog


 * Work with talented engineers and remarkable professionals in Nepal, the US and Europe, building state-of-the-art digital health products.
 * Have an amazing career growth plan with support from experienced mentors and unlimited learning opportunities.
 * Be a part of an experienced team—apply the best industry practices, get mentored by experienced professionals and be ready to mentor the new ones.
 * Get exposure to clients who are leading entrepreneurs and startups from Silicon Valley.
 * Your work will be at the cutting edge of healthcare innovation and make a difference in the lives of thousands of people worldwide.
 * You will get the flexibility to work remotely or in the office— we value accountable freedom.
 * Get growth opportunities, not just in your work. We organize various internal initiatives where you can be a part of a bigger learning community with webinars, Knowledge Sharing Sessions (KSS), and internal conferences.
 * Be a part of a safe workplace where it’s okay to fail fast, get constructive feedback and grow as you move ahead.
 * Get recognized for your work and all the changes you will make. We always look for, NO, create opportunities to celebrate efforts, play games, and have fun together!
 * You will have a lot of fun at Leapfrog, there’ll never be a dull day.
   
   

🎁 Benefits And Perks

We believe our people are our greatest strength. And with perks and benefits, we intend to offer everything our people need to do their best while maintaining a healthy balance between work and personal life.

Daily Work Support


 * 🏠 Hybrid work: Flexibility to work from office or home
 * 💻 Support for resources: Get internet and laptop allowance monthly, and request resources for convenient WFH
 * 📆 5-day workweek: Take the weekend off and come back refreshed on Monday
 * 🍔 Food: Eat healthy food while you’re here.
   
   

Professional Growth


 * 📚 'Growth mindset' fund: Investment in your post-grad degree, learning opportunities, and career growth
 * 👶 Child scholarship: Scholarships for your child in selected schools
 * 📈 Bi-annual bonus: Get timely festival and company bonus
 * 💸 Advance salary: Request salary in advance
   
   

Work/Life Balance


 * ✈️ Paid time-offs: Annual, sick, compensation, and bereavement leaves
 * 🍼 Maternity leave: 3 months of paid leave, 1 month of unpaid leave, and 90 days of reduced workload
 * 🐣 Paternity leave: 11 days of paid paternity leave and reduced workload after
 * 💊 Menstruation leave: 6 days of paid menstruation leave annually
   
   

We take care of you


 * 🌿 Your well-being: Company-funded counseling services from certified therapists as well as covid care services.
 * 💰 Retirement fund: Social security fund with health and accidental insurance.
   
   

Celebrating your efforts


 * 🎉 Engagement and Events: Team lunch/dinner, company outing, and festival celebrations with your favorite co-workers!
 * 😎 Exposure: Visit and work in the States and build better client rapport.
 * 💖 Recognition: In-house awards, appreciation platforms, and 5th-anniversary gifts!

description:
About the job




Company Description

At Avinto, we’re not just another consultancy—we’re a team of problem solvers, builders, and innovators. As a Norwegian IT consultancy firm, we specialize in delivering smart, scalable, and efficient technology solutions for businesses. From systems integrations and process automation to custom software development, we help companies streamline operations and accelerate their digital transformation. What makes us different? We combine Norwegian project management expertise with a highly skilled technical team based in Kathmandu, Nepal. This unique collaboration enables us to deliver top-quality solutions to international clients—efficiently and at competitive costs.




Role Description

We are looking for a skilled Web Game Developer to join our team. The role involves developing interactive, browser-based mini-games and web applications that run efficiently on both mobile and desktop. You will work with other developers to build, optimize, and integrate games using modern web technologies and frameworks.




Candidates are required to submit a demo — either a playable .html file or a link to a deployed site — to demonstrate their work.




Key Responsibilities

 * Develop and extend existing web-based games and interactive applications.
 * Build mini-games using open-source frameworks.
 * Ensure all applications are optimized for performance and mobile responsiveness.
 * Collaborate with backend and mobile teams to integrate APIs.
 * Write high-performance, optimized code using standard browser APIs.
 * Apply WebKit optimizations and ensure compatibility across devices.
 * Conduct regular testing and debugging to maintain quality and stability.




Qualifications

 * Minimum 2 years of experience in React.
 * Strong foundation in TypeScript.
 * Must have developed at least one game (include a demo or link).
 * Familiarity with Phaser, Three.js, PixiJS, or Godot.
 * Experience building or optimizing for mobile browsers.
 * Knowledge of React Native Reanimated and React Native Skia is an advantage.
 * Experience with Expo SDK preferred.
 * Knowledge of C++ is a plus.
 * Interest in games and understanding of the game industry.
 * Comfortable working in an Agile environment with global teams.
 * Good communication skills and a practical problem-solving approach.




Why Join Avinto IT?

 * Work on innovative, large-scale mobile projects for international clients.
 * Collaborative, growth-oriented, and supportive work environment.
 * Competitive salary and benefits package.
 * Opportunities for learning, skill development, and career growth.




If you’re passionate about frontend development and eager to work in a forward-thinking, international environment, we’d love to hear from you!




Apply now and become part of our growing team at Avinto.




Please do not include your last name or picture in your CV to help us maintain a fair and unbiased hiring process.
title: Senior Web Game Developer (TypeScript)

description:
About Tirnu

At Tirnu, we’re building the future of Embedded Banking in Europe. Our platform helps users connect multiple bank accounts, invest in tokenized assets, and gain real-time insights into spending — all in one sleek interface.




We’re not just building functionality — we’re crafting experiences. That’s where you come in.




The Role




We're looking for a Front-End Developer with a designer’s eye — someone who lives and breathes pixels, layout, spacing, and UX patterns. You will own the UI implementation of our dashboards and fintech tools using React + TypeScript, working hand-in-hand with our designers and backend engineers.

If you love design systems, dashboard layouts, micro-interactions, and translating Figma files into crisp, responsive React components — this role is for you.




What You’ll Do




 * Translate Figma designs into clean, responsive, component-based React UIs
 * Build beautiful dashboard layouts with grids, modals, sidebars, tables, and charts
 * Maintain pixel-perfect alignment, spacing, and typography across the product
 * Create and manage a component library and contribute to our evolving design system
 * Implement micro-animations, hover states, and intuitive UX interactions
 * Collaborate with product and backend teams to make sure interfaces feel fast and intuitive

Tech Stack

 * React + TypeScript
 * Tailwind CSS or styled-components (or CSS Modules)
 * Figma for designs
 * REST / GraphQL APIs
 * GitHub + CI/CD pipelines
 * Bonus: D3.js / Chart.js / Recharts for visualizations




What You Bring




 * 3+ years in React front-end development
 * Strong understanding of responsive layouts, flex/grid, and modern UI architecture
 * Passion for clean, consistent, detail-oriented UI
 * You care about line height, border-radius, and semantic HTML
 * Experience working closely with Figma files
 * Familiarity with design systems and building UI kits
 * Bonus: You’ve built or contributed to a dashboard, admin panel, or data-heavy UI




Why Join Tirnu




 * Build the UI of a new financial platform from scratch
 * Direct impact on product experience and design language
 * Work with a passionate, fast-moving team in fintech and Web3

description:
Job Title:

Full Stack Software Engineer




Job Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Full Stack Software Engineer with strong frontend and backend expertise to join our team and drive the development of scalable, distributed software solutions. You will play a crucial role in architecting and implementing our GraphQL-based microservices infrastructure, while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver robust enterprise applications from conceptualization through deployment.




Job Description:

As a Full Stack Software Engineer with, you will be responsible for designing and implementing sophisticated distributed systems and GraphQL APIs that power our applications. Your responsibilities will include:

 * Actively develop and deliver production-ready code in TypeScript/JavaScript, with emphasis on backend services using Node.js and NestJS / React.js frameworks.
 * Architect and implement GraphQL APIs.
 * Develop reusable frontend components with Next.js when needed, ensuring seamless integration with GraphQL APIs using Apollo Client.
 * Develop and maintain efficient database schemas using Prisma ORM, working with MongoDB, MySQL, and implementing Redis for caching strategies.
 * Build scalable backend services with NestJS/Express.js, implementing proper authentication, authorization, and security best practices.
 * Create optimized GraphQL schemas following best practices for type design, pagination, error handling, and field-level caching strategies.
 * Implement comprehensive testing strategies including unit tests, integration tests, and GraphQL-specific testing for resolvers and schema validation.
 * Deploy and manage applications on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) using services like Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Pub/Sub, and Cloud SQL.
 * Optimize query performance using DataLoader patterns, query complexity analysis, and implement proper caching strategies at multiple levels.
 * Design and implement CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment across multiple environments.
 * Monitor and optimize application performance, implementing observability and tracing for distributed GraphQL services.
 * Collaborate with teams to ensure optimal API design and efficient data fetching patterns.
 * Maintain clear documentation for GraphQL schemas, API contracts, and architectural decisions.




Job Specification:

Required Skills and Expertise:

 * Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field.
 * Experience: 3+ years of experience as a Full Stack Software Engineer.
 * Programming Languages: Expert proficiency in TypeScript/JavaScript for fullstack development.
 * Frontend Framework: Experience with Next.js for full-stack applications is preferred. Understanding of React.js and server-side rendering concepts.
 * Backend Frameworks: Strong hands-on experience with NestJS or Express.js for building scalable Node.js applications. NestJS expertise is highly preferred.
 * GraphQL experience: Experience with Apollo GraphQL ecosystem is required with experience using it in the frontend and backend.
 * Database & ORM: Proficiency with Prisma ORM is required. Strong experience with MongoDB and MySQL databases. Redis implementation for caching and session management.
 * Cloud Services: Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) including Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Cloud SQL, Pub/Sub, Cloud Storage, and Firebase/Firestore.
 * Testing: Comprehensive knowledge of testing methodologies including unit testing, integration testing, and GraphQL-specific testing strategies using Jest, Supertest, and Apollo testing utilities.
 * DevOps & Deployment: Experience with Docker containerization, Kubernetes orchestration, and implementing CI/CD pipelines using tools like GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Google Cloud Build.
 * API Design: Strong understanding of RESTful API design principles and GraphQL best practices, including versioning strategies and backward compatibility.
 * Security: Solid understanding of web application security, OWASP guidelines, JWT authentication, and GraphQL-specific security considerations.
 * Performance Optimization: Experience with application profiling, database query optimization, caching strategies, and distributed system performance tuning.




Preferred Qualifications:

 * Experience with microservices architecture and event-driven systems
 * Knowledge of message queuing systems (RabbitMQ, Google Pub/Sub)
 * Familiarity with monitoring tools (Datadog, New Relic, or Google Cloud Monitoring)

Candidates who possess a combination of these qualifications, are passionate about software development, and are eager to contribute to our dynamic team are encouraged to apply.




What We're Looking For:

We need someone who is passionate about fullstack engineering and has deep expertise in building scalable GraphQL services with experience in Prisma, Node.js, NestJS, React.js, and NextJS.




Candidates who possess these qualifications, and are eager to work on challenging distributed systems are encouraged to apply.




Application Procedure:

 1. Email your application and resume to careers@maitriservices.com
 2. Mention “Full stack Software Engineer” in the email subject.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer

description:
Job Description

We help the world see new possibilities and inspire change for better tomorrows. Our analytic solutions bridge content, data, and analytics to help business, people, and society become stronger, more resilient, and sustainable.

Responsibilities

What you get to do every day:


 * Design and develop high performance software libraries and APIs
 * Implement highly scalable, performant, fault tolerant processing systems in an AWS environment
 * Be involved in all phases of the agile software development lifecycle
 * Work with our Product teams to gather detailed requirements for new products, services & tools.
 * Proactively seek out and minimize pain points within the infrastructure and code base
 * Keep up-to-date with the latest technologies and introduce them as needed
 * Create next-gen solutions for unique and challenging use cases
 * Analyze, debug and fix defects
   
   

What You Bring To The Role


 * Have strong sense of ownership
 * Be focused, passionate, and strive to find simple solutions to complex problems
 * Have previous design/development experience with large-scale production systems and/or data platforms with knowledge of high availability cloud-based applications
 * Possess strong troubleshooting, code optimization and refactoring skills.
 * Experience working with Business Stakeholders. Ability to elaborate and convert business requirements into technical requirements, create architecture and design documents for the stakeholders.
 * Be comfortable working in a dynamic environment
 * Excellent communication skills (written and verbal)
   
   

Qualifications


 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering or a related subject
 * 5+ years full-time work experience in .NET technologies
 * Strong ability to build RESTful services in C# with .NET/.NET Core
 * Experience working on the JavaScript frameworks (like: Angular 6+, AngularJS, JQuery), Web Markup Languages (HTML/HTML5, XML) and Style Sheet Language (CSS/CSS3)
 * Proficient in SQL and relational database concepts
 * Experience working with PostgreSQL
 * Strong understanding of object-oriented programming
 * Strong understanding of AWS architecture, including services like EC2, Lambda, S3, API Gateway, RDS
 * Familiar with various design and architectural patterns
 * Knack for writing clean, readable, and easily maintainable code
 * Understanding of fundamental design principles for building a scalable application
 * Proficient in implementing automated unit tests using frameworks like xUnit, NUnit, or MSTest
 * Proficient understanding of code versioning using GIT
 * Experience with Agile methodologies and tools like Jira
 * Familiarity with DevOps practices and tools like Docker, and CI/CD pipelines
 * Familiarity with Kubernetes is good to have
 * Experience with React.js; familiarity with Next.js is a plus
 * Experience with logging frameworks (Serilog, NLog)
 * Familiarity with API documentation using Swagger / OpenAPI
 * Familiar with CloudWatch, Splunk, or similar monitoring tools
   
   

About Us

Our People, Our Culture

For more than 50 years, Verisk has helped property and casualty insurers make smarter decisions about risk through AI-powered risk modeling, advanced analytics, and technology solutions spanning the entire policy lifecycle. We are a leading strategic data, analytics, and technology partner to the global insurance industry, guided by core values of learning, caring, and results while maintaining the highest ethical standards as stewards of the industry's most comprehensive datasets. Learn more about Verisk and what we are doing within the insurance industry.

When you join Verisk, you become part of a diverse global team with over 7,500 professionals in 30 plus countries, making work that matters. We're certified by Great Place to Work, reflecting our commitment to inclusivity, employee engagement, and wellbeing. At Verisk, your growth is a priority—from professional development and tuition benefits to a supportive, flexible workplace culture, we support your continued growth.

Our Culture : Explore our inclusive, people-first culture that fosters innovation, collaboration, and belonging.

Awards & Recognition : See why Verisk is consistently recognized as a Great Place to Work™ around the world.

Our Businesses : Learn about the diverse industries we serve — from insurance and energy to financial services and beyond.

Life at Verisk : Discover what it’s like to work at Verisk through employee stories, team highlights, and culture moments.

Careers at Verisk : Join a global team of problem-solvers and innovators doing meaningful work that’s shaping the future of industries. Whether you're just starting out or looking to take your career to the next level, Verisk offers growth, purpose, and a people-first culture

Let’s build something meaningful together!

Verisk Analytics is an equal opportunity employer.

description:
About the job




Company Description

At Avinto, we’re not just another consultancy—we’re a team of problem solvers, builders, and innovators. As a Norwegian IT consultancy firm, we specialize in delivering smart, scalable, and efficient technology solutions for businesses. From systems integrations and process automation to custom software development, we help companies streamline operations and accelerate their digital transformation. What makes us different? We combine Norwegian project management expertise with a highly skilled technical team based in Kathmandu, Nepal. This unique collaboration enables us to deliver top-quality solutions to international clients—efficiently and at competitive costs.




Role Description

We are looking for a skilled Web Game Developer to join our team. The role involves developing interactive, browser-based mini-games and web applications that run efficiently on both mobile and desktop. You will work with other developers to build, optimize, and integrate games using modern web technologies and frameworks.




Candidates are required to submit a demo — either a playable .html file or a link to a deployed site — to demonstrate their work.




Key Responsibilities

 * Develop and extend existing web-based games and interactive applications.
 * Build mini-games using open-source frameworks.
 * Ensure all applications are optimized for performance and mobile responsiveness.
 * Collaborate with backend and mobile teams to integrate APIs.
 * Write high-performance, optimized code using standard browser APIs.
 * Apply WebKit optimizations and ensure compatibility across devices.
 * Conduct regular testing and debugging to maintain quality and stability.




Qualifications

 * Minimum 2 years of experience in React.
 * Strong foundation in TypeScript.
 * Must have developed at least one game (include a demo or link).
 * Familiarity with Phaser, Three.js, PixiJS, or Godot.
 * Experience building or optimizing for mobile browsers.
 * Knowledge of React Native Reanimated and React Native Skia is an advantage.
 * Experience with Expo SDK preferred.
 * Knowledge of C++ is a plus.
 * Interest in games and understanding of the game industry.
 * Comfortable working in an Agile environment with global teams.
 * Good communication skills and a practical problem-solving approach.




Why Join Avinto IT?

 * Work on innovative, large-scale mobile projects for international clients.
 * Collaborative, growth-oriented, and supportive work environment.
 * Competitive salary and benefits package.
 * Opportunities for learning, skill development, and career growth.




If you’re passionate about frontend development and eager to work in a forward-thinking, international environment, we’d love to hear from you!




Apply now and become part of our growing team at Avinto.




Please do not include your last name or picture in your CV to help us maintain a fair and unbiased hiring process.

About This Role

As a Senior Node.js Developer, you’ll be a key player in an award-winning mobile app development company that’s leading innovation across Australia and beyond. Our mission is to reshape how mobile applications are built, launched, and scaled, offering cutting-edge solutions that address real-world challenges and help businesses thrive. In this role, you’ll work closely with a dynamic Agile team, guided by an experienced Scrum Product Owner and Scrum Master, to build high-performance applications that exceed client expectations. We believe growth is about more than just coding—it's about evolving, learning, and pushing boundaries. That’s why we provide professional development programs to help you sharpen your skills and accelerate your career.

Read more

Report To

Engineering Manager

Talent Spotlight


 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science related degree.
 * Minimum 2 years of relevant experience in respective tech stack.
 * Inquisitive, determined, diligent and has an open mind
 * Logical, tactful, problem-solver, self-learner
 * Zeal towards learning new things and towards growing in one’s career
   
   

The Impact Zone


 * Transform ideas into reality – Study solution design documents and translate them into well-structured, efficient, and maintainable code.
 * Develop high-quality applications – Build and refine applications using this tech stack with a strong focus on performance and scalability.
 * Collaborate & innovate – Work closely with designers, engineers, and product managers to create seamless, user-friendly applications.
 * Ensure code excellence – Write optimized, reusable, and scalable code while following best practices and coding standards.
 * Master APIs & data management – Design and develop RESTful APIs, ensuring smooth data exchange between systems.
 * Optimize database performance – Work with SQL and NoSQL databases (MongoDB, MySQL, PostgreSQL) to design efficient schemas and queries.
 * Stay Agile & adaptive – Actively participate in sprint planning, stand-ups, and retrospectives to continuously improve processes.
 * Own your growth – Work with your Engineering Manager to map out your professional development plan and achieve your learning goals.
   
   

Expected Strengths And Competencies


 * Core Development Skills:
    * Extensive experience in developing and deploying scalable web applications using Node.js.
    * Advanced proficiency in JavaScript, with a strong grasp of modern frameworks and best practices.
    * Hands-on experience with Vue.js or React.js, and the ability to architect efficient front-end-backend interactions.
    * Proven ability to design, optimize, and scale application architecture for high-performance systems.
    * Expertise in developing RESTful APIs and designing complex API structures with security and efficiency in mind.

 * Best Practices & Problem-Solving:
    * Deep knowledge of software architecture patterns, microservices, and best practices for enterprise-level applications.
    * Strong experience with database schema design (SQL & NoSQL), query optimization, and performance tuning.
    * Proficiency in Git, CI/CD pipelines, and DevOps best practices.
    * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to debug, optimize, and refactor complex codebases.
    * Ability to mentor and guide junior developers, conduct code reviews, and drive technical excellence across the team.
      
      

 * 
    * Experience with NestJS, GraphQL, and event-driven architectures.
    * Strong understanding of cloud services (AWS, GCP, or Azure) and containerization (Docker, Kubernetes).
    * Familiarity with Test-Driven Development (TDD) and writing robust, automated test cases.
    * Awareness of security best practices, authentication/authorization protocols, and application hardening strategies.

description:
About Tirnu

At Tirnu, we’re building the future of Embedded Banking in Europe. Our platform helps users connect multiple bank accounts, invest in tokenized assets, and gain real-time insights into spending — all in one sleek interface.




We’re not just building functionality — we’re crafting experiences. That’s where you come in.




The Role




We're looking for a Front-End Developer with a designer’s eye — someone who lives and breathes pixels, layout, spacing, and UX patterns. You will own the UI implementation of our dashboards and fintech tools using React + TypeScript, working hand-in-hand with our designers and backend engineers.

If you love design systems, dashboard layouts, micro-interactions, and translating Figma files into crisp, responsive React components — this role is for you.




What You’ll Do




 * Translate Figma designs into clean, responsive, component-based React UIs
 * Build beautiful dashboard layouts with grids, modals, sidebars, tables, and charts
 * Maintain pixel-perfect alignment, spacing, and typography across the product
 * Create and manage a component library and contribute to our evolving design system
 * Implement micro-animations, hover states, and intuitive UX interactions
 * Collaborate with product and backend teams to make sure interfaces feel fast and intuitive

Tech Stack

 * React + TypeScript
 * Tailwind CSS or styled-components (or CSS Modules)
 * Figma for designs
 * REST / GraphQL APIs
 * GitHub + CI/CD pipelines
 * Bonus: D3.js / Chart.js / Recharts for visualizations




What You Bring




 * 3+ years in React front-end development
 * Strong understanding of responsive layouts, flex/grid, and modern UI architecture
 * Passion for clean, consistent, detail-oriented UI
 * You care about line height, border-radius, and semantic HTML
 * Experience working closely with Figma files
 * Familiarity with design systems and building UI kits
 * Bonus: You’ve built or contributed to a dashboard, admin panel, or data-heavy UI




Why Join Tirnu




 * Build the UI of a new financial platform from scratch
 * Direct impact on product experience and design language
 * Work with a passionate, fast-moving team in fintech and Web3

description:
Tirnu is an Embedded Banking and Digital Asset platform where users connect multiple bank accounts, invest in tokenized and crypto assets, and grow their income while tracking spending in real time through automated categorization and actionable insights.




We’re bridging traditional finance (TradFi) and decentralized finance (DeFi) by enabling users to interact with both fiat and blockchain ecosystems through a single, secure interface.




Position Overview: Full Stack Developer (Node.js / TypeScript)




We are seeking an experienced Full Stack Developer with deep expertise in Node.js, TypeScript, and blockchain integration to join our growing engineering team. In this role, you will design, build, and maintain key components of our fintech and crypto infrastructure — powering seamless experiences across banking, tokenized investments, and digital asset management.




Your strong background in AWS, NoSQL databases, and Git, combined with hands-on experience in crypto APIs, wallet management, or blockchain data processing, will be essential for delivering scalable, high-performance, and secure solutions.




Experience with Elasticsearch, microservices, and Web3 integration is highly desirable and will be considered a strong advantage.




Key Responsibilities




 * Architect, develop, and maintain scalable full-stack and blockchain-integrated applications using Node.js and TypeScript, adhering to clean code principles and industry best practices.
 * Design and implement efficient, secure, and maintainable backend services and APIs using AWS (EC2, Lambda, API Gateway, etc.).
 * Build and manage crypto-related services, including wallet connections, blockchain data indexing, transaction tracking, and tokenized asset modules.
 * Work with NoSQL databases such as MongoDB or DynamoDB, optimizing for performance, scalability, and data integrity.
 * Collaborate closely with frontend engineers to deliver seamless, responsive user experiences using modern web technologies.
 * Manage the codebase through Git and participate in CI/CD pipelines to ensure robust and efficient development workflows.
 * Integrate Elasticsearch for high-performance search capabilities and scalable data access.
 * Design and implement services using microservices and Web3 architecture to enhance modularity, flexibility, and blockchain interoperability.
 * Proactively troubleshoot, debug, and optimize performance across the entire stack and blockchain layers.
 * Stay abreast of new technologies in fintech and crypto including smart contracts, DeFi protocols, and Web3 frameworks to continuously drive innovation.




Qualifications




 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or equivalent practical experience.
 * 3+ years of hands-on experience as a Full Stack Developer with a strong focus on Node.js and TypeScript.
 * Experience working with blockchain technologies, crypto APIs (e.g., Ethereum, Polygon, Bitcoin, Solana), or digital asset custody/wallet systems (e.g., Fireblocks, Web3.js, Ethers.js).
 * Advanced proficiency in AWS services including EC2, S3, Lambda, API Gateway, and related infrastructure.
 * Solid experience with NoSQL databases (e.g., MongoDB, DynamoDB), including schema design and performance tuning.
 * Proficient in using Git for source control and experienced in working within agile, collaborative development environments.
 * Experience with Elasticsearch and familiarity with microservices and Web3-based architectures is highly desirable.
 * Strong analytical, problem-solving, and debugging skills with a proactive and solution-oriented mindset.
 * Excellent communication and teamwork abilities, with a passion for building secure, compliant, and innovative fintech–crypto solutions in a fast-paced environment.




Join Us




If you're a seasoned developer passionate about fintech, blockchain, and digital assets, and ready to redefine how people interact with money, we’d love to hear from you. Join a collaborative, innovation-driven team where your contributions directly shape the future of embedded finance and crypto in Europe.




Apply now and become part of Tirnu’s mission to connect banking, blockchain, and opportunity.

description:
Smarten Technologies, founded by a team of skilled professionals, specializes in providing diverse Information & Technology (IT) services designed to meet the evolving needs of today’s digital landscape. With a mission to drive accelerated and sustainable business growth, the company focuses on creating and implementing innovative marketing solutions for its clients. Smarten Technologies leverages expertise in IT to deliver smart, efficient solutions that empower businesses to thrive in a competitive environment.




As a React Native Mobile Developer, you will be responsible for developing and maintaining features for both Android and iOS platforms. You'll work with modern React Native tooling, write clean, maintainable code, and play a key role in mentoring and onboarding new team members. This position requires both technical expertise and collaborative leadership skills.




Key Responsibilities

Development & Engineering

 * Develop and maintain cross-platform mobile applications using React Native for both Android and iOS
 * Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code following best practices and team standards
 * Build responsive UI components optimised for mobile performance
 * Integrate with REST/GraphQL APIs and third-party services




Technical Leadership & Mentoring

 * Onboard and groom new team members on React Native development practices
 * Share knowledge through code reviews, pair programming, and technical documentation
 * Contribute to architectural decisions and technical roadmap planning




Quality & Maintenance

 * Implement and maintain testing using Jest and Enzyme
 * Debug and resolve performance issues across both platforms
 * Ensure application stability, security, and scalability




Cross-Platform Native Expertise

 * Develop custom native plugins/modules when required using:
 * Android/Java for Android platform
 * iOS/Objective-C/Swift for iOS platform
 * Bridge React Native components with native functionality as needed




Technical Requirements

Core Competencies (Required)

 * 2+ years of professional React Native development experience
 * Proficient in React Native APIs and component rendering
 * Strong experience with state management using:
 * Redux (with middleware: Redux-Thunk or Redux-Saga)
 * Context API
 * Experience with React-Router for navigation
 * Working knowledge of GraphQL for API integration
 * Hands-on experience with Jest and Enzyme for testing
 * Basic native development skills in either:
 * Android (Java/Kotlin) OR
 * iOS (Objective-C/Swift)
 * Understanding of mobile app deployment to App Store and Google Play




Preferred Qualifications

 * Experience with Firebase services (Auth, Cloud Messaging, Analytics)
 * Familiarity with Circle CI or other CI/CD pipelines
 * Knowledge of TypeScript in React Native
 * Experience with performance optimisation and memory management
 * Previous mentoring or team leadership experience




Soft Skills & Attributes

 * Team player with excellent collaboration and communication skills
 * Strong mentoring and knowledge-sharing abilities
 * Problem-solving mindset with attention to detail
 * Ability to work in agile environments and adapt to changing requirements
 * Proactive attitude toward learning and adopting new technologies

Archisys Innovations & Developers is a premier hub for digital transformation. We specialize in building high-performance software, crafting impactful digital marketing strategies, and delivering end-to-end IT solutions that help businesses scale in the modern era.




We are looking for a creative, trend-savvy Social Media Content Creator to join our team in Kathmandu. If you live and breathe digital trends and know how to turn a brand’s vision into viral content, we want you on our team!




🌟 Why Join Archisys?




At Archisys Innovations & Developers, we foster a culture of excellence, collaboration, and continuous innovation. You’ll be working alongside a team of developers, designers, and marketers who are passionate about transforming ideas into high-quality technology products. We offer a dynamic environment where your creativity is valued and professional growth is a priority.




📝 Role Description




Location: Kathmandu (On-site)




Type: Full-time




Key Responsibilities:




Content Strategy: Develop, curate, and schedule engaging content for our brand and our clients across various platforms.




Trend Monitoring: Stay ahead of the curve with the latest social media trends, tools, and algorithm changes.




Collaboration: Work closely with the marketing and design teams to ensure branding and messaging are consistent and impactful.




Analytics: Track and analyze performance metrics to optimize strategies and boost engagement.




Community Management: Engage with followers to build a loyal and active online community.




✅ Qualifications




Education: Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, or a related field.




Storytelling: Strong copywriting and storytelling skills with a flair for creative messaging.




Visual Skills: Basic graphic design and video editing skills (for Reels, TikToks, and Shorts).




Management: Proven experience in social media planning, posting, and community management.




Strategy: Solid understanding of digital marketing principles and social media analytics.




Soft Skills: Highly organized, proactive, and a great team player.




💻 Our Core Expertise:




Custom Web & Mobile App Development




Enterprise Software & Automation




Digital Marketing & SEO Strategies




UI/UX Design & Branding




Cloud-Based Platforms & API Integrations




📩 How to Apply




Ready to make a tangible impact through technology and creativity?




Email: sabindangol@archisysinnovation.com

description:
We’re Hiring! | Mid Level Graphic Designer

  Location: Sifal, Kathmandu

  Company: Brahmabyte Lab Pvt. Ltd

  Employment Type: Full-time (7 AM to 4 PM), Onsite

About the Role

 We are looking for a talented and creative Mid-Level Graphic Designer to join our growing team. The ideal candidate should have strong visual communication skills, attention to detail, and the ability to translate ideas into high-quality designs across digital and print platforms.

Key Responsibilities

 * Design engaging graphics for social media, websites, banners, ads, and other digital platforms.
 * Create layouts for print materials such as brochures, posters, and event visuals.
 * Translate briefs into creative concepts and execute them independently.
 * Maintain and evolve brand guidelines across all design touchpoints.
 * Collaborate with marketing, product, and development teams to deliver cohesive visuals.
 * Prepare and export assets optimized for different platforms (web, mobile, print).
 * Ensure design consistency and high standards throughout all projects.
 * Support junior designers when needed.




Required Skills & Qualifications

 * Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, or related field (or equivalent experience).
 * 2–4 years of professional design experience with a strong portfolio.
 * Proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (Illustrator, Photoshop, InDesign).
 * Familiarity with Figma or similar design tools.
 * Strong understanding of typography, layout, color theory, and branding.
 * Experience designing for digital marketing and social media platforms.
 * Ability to manage multiple projects and meet deadlines.
 * Strong communication and collaboration skills.
 * Attention to detail with a passion for creative problem-solving.




Preferred (Not Mandatory)

 * Motion graphics or animation skills (After Effects).
 * Basic video editing experience.
 * Experience with UI/UX concepts.
 * Ability to create brand guidelines and visual systems.




How to Apply

Interested candidates are encouraged to send their updated CV at hire@brahmabytelab.com with the subject line: “Application for Mid Level Graphic Designer”.

description:
We are looking for a Senior UI/UX Designer to join our Nepal team.

The ideal candidate will have a minimum of 3 years’ experience at a senior design level.

Requirement


 * 5+ years full-stack design (concept, user experience, user interface) in consideration of websites, applications and web assets
 * Extremely well versed with Adobe Creative Suite including a strong command of PhotoShop, experience with Illustrator and knowledge of Indesign
 * Strong knowledge of HTML5, CSS, and JavaScript
 * Proven ability to create clean HTML code utilizing the latest, creative CSS techniques
 * Deep understanding of best practices in responsive design for mobile optimization
 * Experience with creating interfaces based on UX best practices
 * Ability to deliver strong design based on business requirements, brand and strategy
   
   

Skills Required


 * Possess a strong sense of design principles, typography, composition and conceptual thinking
 * Excellent presentation, communication and listening skills with English fluency
 * Interactive prototyping skills
 * Desire and ability to work in a fast-paced high-pressure environment with deadlines and high standards
 * Good time management skills
   
   

Key Responsibilities


 * Lead creative strategy for all web, mobile, digital and application initiatives while executing the aligned brand creative vision
 * Responsible for designing and building highly impactful design solutions
 * Create designs and wireframes from concept for maximum usability

description:
Responsibilities

 * Design user-centric interfaces including wireframes, mockups, prototypes, and UI layouts.
 * Conduct basic user research, usability testing, and analyze feedback to improve user experience and user flows.
 * Develop responsive web pages using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and modern frameworks such as React or Vue.
 * Accurately translate UI/UX designs into clean, reusable, and functional frontend code.
 * Ensure cross-browser and cross-device compatibility and optimize UI performance.
 * Collaborate closely with developers, product managers, and QA teams to ensure smooth project execution.
 * Maintain design consistency by following style guides, design systems, and reusable components.
 * Test, debug, and refine UI/UX based on user feedback, analytics, and business requirements.
 * Stay updated with the latest UI/UX trends, tools, and best practices.




Requirements

 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Design, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience).
 * 3+ Years of experience
 * Basic to intermediate proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, or similar.
 * Working knowledge of HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.
 * Familiarity with React, Vue, or other frontend frameworks is a plus.
 * Understanding of responsive design, accessibility, and usability standards.
 * Strong foundation in UX principles, interaction design, and visual design best practices.
 * Ability to understand business requirements and convert them into user-friendly solutions.
 * Attention to detail and a problem-solving mindset.

Soft Skills

 * Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
 * Good time management and ability to handle multiple tasks.
 * Passion for learning, self-improvement, and design innovation.

description:
About Company

The Product Manager – IT will lead the planning, execution, and delivery of various IT products and digital projects within the organization. This role ensures that all IT solutions are aligned with business needs, user expectations, and strategic goals. The Product Manager will act as the bridge between Business Units, Developers, IT Operations, and Leadership—owning the product lifecycle from ideation to rollout and continuous improvement.

Key Responsibilities


 * Product Strategy & Roadmap Development
 * Develop and maintain a product roadmap aligned with company objectives.
 * Analyze business needs and translate them into long-term product strategies.
 * Identify digital opportunities and propose new product ideas or enhancements.
 * Requirement Gathering & Documentation
 * Conduct requirements gathering sessions with stakeholders and end-users.
 * Prepare and validate Business Requirement Documents (BRD) and Functional Requirement Documents (FRD).
 * Prioritize features based on business value, feasibility, and urgency.
 * Project & Product Execution
 * Lead the end-to-end lifecycle of assigned IT products and projects.
 * Coordinate with internal IT teams and external vendors to ensure timely execution.
 * Monitor project progress and ensure delivery within timelines, scope, and budget.
 * Conduct sprint planning (if Agile) and track deliverables.
 * User Acceptance Testing (UAT) & Go-Live Management
 * Prepare UAT plans and coordinate UAT execution with business users.
 * Ensure UAT findings are recorded, validated, and resolved.
 * Oversee go-live deployment, ensuring minimal disruption to operations.
 * Provide hypercare and support during post-go-live phases.
 * Product Performance Monitoring & Enhancement
 * Track product usage, performance, and SLAs.
 * Identify bugs, gaps, system issues, and improvement needs.
 * Maintain a backlog of enhancements and plan releases.
 * Periodically review product relevance and ROI.
 * Stakeholder Management
 * Serve as the key point of contact between business units and IT teams.
 * Provide clear communication on timelines, requirements, and project updates.
 * Facilitate cross-functional alignment and manage expectations.
 * Vendor & Third-Party Coordination
 * Coordinate with external vendors for customization, development, or integration.
 * Ensure compliance with contractual requirements.
 * Evaluate vendor performance and recommend improvements.
 * Training & Change Management
 * Plan and conduct product training for end-users.
 * Develop user manuals, training materials, and process flows.
 * Ensure smooth adoption of new systems by leading change management activities.
 * Compliance, Security & Documentation
 * Ensure products comply with internal policies, IT security standards, and regulatory requirements.
 * Maintain updated documentation of all product features, changes, and integrations.
 * Reporting & Dashboards
 * Prepare weekly/monthly product progress reports.
 * Track KPIs, risks, and mitigation plans.
 * Present insights and recommendations to IT Head/Management.
   
   

Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)


 * Timely completion of product milestones and releases.
 * Accuracy and completeness of BRD/FRD documents.
 * UAT success rate and number of post-go-live issues.
 * User satisfaction score and adoption rate.
 * Reduction of manual or inefficient processes through digitization.
 * Delivery of product improvements within agreed SLAs.
 * Effective vendor performance and cost optimization.
 * Quality of product documentation and reporting.
   
   

Job Specifications

Qualification & Experience


 * Bachelor’s degree in IT, Computer Science, or a related field (Master’s preferred).
 * 5–8 years of experience in product management, business analysis, or IT project management.
 * Experience in managing enterprise applications and digital platforms.
 * Prior experience working with Agile/Scrum methodologies is an advantage.
   
   

Skills & Expertise


 * Strong understanding of systems, databases, and product lifecycle.
 * Excellent skills in requirement analysis, documentation, and problem-solving.
 * Strong communication and stakeholder management abilities.
 * Ability to manage multiple products/projects simultaneously.
 * Knowledge of software development processes and product testing.
 * Familiarity with UX/UI concepts and user-centric product design.
 * Analytical mindset with data-driven decision-making.
   
   

Skills: management,documentation,project,it,training,adoption,go,digital,live,projects,ui/ux design

Job Description

About The Role

We are seeking a highly creative and detail-oriented Short-form Video Editor to join our team. In this role, you will transform long-form content such as podcasts, interviews, and discussions into engaging short-form videos optimised for platforms like TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, and LinkedIn. You’ll be responsible for crafting visually compelling, high-retention content that resonates with our target audience and aligns with our brand voice.

Key Responsibilities


 * Edit short-form videos (30–90 seconds) from podcasts, interviews, and raw footage.
 * Craft hooks, captions, and storylines that maximise viewer retention and engagement.
 * Adapt editing styles to suit different platforms (TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, LinkedIn).
 * Use motion graphics, memes, sound design, and creative transitions to enhance storytelling.
 * Collaborate with the marketing and podcast teams to identify key moments worth highlighting.
 * Maintain a consistent brand look and feel, while experimenting with new creative formats.
 * Repurpose long-form content into multiple short clips optimised for each platform.
 * Track and analyse content performance metrics, refining editing strategies based on data.
 * Stay up to date with industry trends, social media formats, and editing innovations to keep the brand ahead of the curve.
   
   

Requirements


 * 2–3+ years of proven experience editing short-form content (TikTok, YouTube Shorts, Instagram Reels, LinkedIn).
 * Strong portfolio demonstrating engaging and high-performing short-form edits.
 * Proficiency in editing software such as Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or After Effects.
 * Solid understanding of captions, motion graphics, pacing, and storytelling for social platforms.
 * Awareness of content algorithms and factors that drive engagement across different channels.
 * Ability to work efficiently under deadlines while maintaining high-quality output.
 * Creative mindset with strong storytelling instincts, humour, and attention to detail.
 * Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
 * Experience with B2B content and the ability to make it engaging and accessible is a plus.
   
   

Performance Metrics

In this role, you’ll be accountable for achieving the following outcomes:


 * Output: Consistent delivery of high-quality short-form clips each week.
 * Engagement: Growth in views, watch time, and interactions across TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube Shorts.
 * Reach: Increase in followers, impressions, and audience reach driven by short-form content.
 * Creative Innovation: Regular introduction of new editing styles, trends, and formats.
 * Collaboration: Positive feedback and alignment with marketing and podcast teams.

Job Description

We are seeking an experienced Senior Software Architect to lead our engineering team in designing and implementing highly scalable, maintainable, and robust Node.js microservices applications.

# Key Responsibilities


 * Design and architect scalable, resilient microservices-based applications using Node.js and TypeScript
 * Establish architectural patterns, coding standards, and best practices for the engineering team
 * Create and maintain Infrastructure as Code (IaC) using Terraform for consistent environment provisioning
 * Develop and optimize CI/CD pipelines to ensure reliable, automated deployments
 * Conduct code reviews and provide technical mentorship to team members
 * Collaborate with product managers to translate business requirements into technical specifications
 * Identify and mitigate technical debt and architectural risks
 * Stay current with industry trends and emerging technologies to continuously improve our tech stack
   
   

# Required Skills & Experience


 * 8+ years of software development experience, with at least 4 years in Sr. Developer roles
 * Deep expertise in Node.js and TypeScript for building production-grade microservices
 * Extensive experience with cloud-native architectures and distributed systems
 * Proven track record designing and implementing high-throughput, low-latency systems
 * Strong understanding of Infrastructure as Code (IaC) principles and hands-on experience with Terraform
 * Experience setting up and optimizing CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI, etc.)
 * Proficiency with containerization technologies (Docker, Kubernetes)
 * Strong knowledge of database technologies, both SQL and NoSQL (PostgreSQL, MongoDB, DynamoDB)
 * Experience with API design (REST, GraphQL) and API gateway patterns
 * Understanding of security best practices and compliance requirements
   
   

# Leadership & Soft Skills


 * Proven ability to lead and mentor engineering teams
 * Excellent communication skills with the ability to explain complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical stakeholders
 * Strong problem-solving abilities and analytical thinking
 * Experience working in Agile/Scrum environments
 * Ability to balance technical excellence with business priorities and deadlines
 * Collaborative approach to working with cross-functional teams
   
   

# Education & Certifications


 * Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering, or related field (Master's degree preferred)

description:
Job Overview

To lead the entire Quality Assurance, Quality Control, and product R&D functions, ensuring product safety, regulatory compliance, continuous improvement, and development of new and improved products suitable for market demands.

Key Responsibilities


 * Establish and implement food safety & quality systems: GMP, GHP, HACCP, FSSAI, ISO standards.
 * Develop SOPs for production, packing, sanitation, and quality monitoring.
 * Conduct internal audits and coordinate third-party audits.
 * Ensure compliance with regulatory standards (FSSAI, BIS, customer specifications).
 * Oversee raw material inspection (moisture, fungus %, grain quality, density, microbiology as required).
 * Monitor in-process and finished product quality (maize grit grades, snack quality, flour parameters, packaging integrity).
 * Approve batches, analyze test reports, and take corrective actions in case of deviations.
 * Ensure calibration of lab equipment and maintain test records.
 * Lead development of new products, formulations, and process improvements.
 * Modify recipes based on cost, performance, customer feedback, and quality issues.
 * Conduct product trials for new SKUs or process changes.
 * Maintain detailed documentation of all trials and results.
 * Drive initiatives for yield improvement, wastage reduction, and process optimization.
 * Implement quality improvement projects based on data analysis.
 * Collaborate closely with production, maintenance, and procurement for better results.
 * Train QC/QA/R&D staff on testing methods, SOPs, hygiene practices.
 * Allocate tasks, monitor performance, and ensure smooth workflow within quality department.
 * Foster a culture of quality and accountability across the plant.
 * Manage customer audits, sample approvals, and technical support.
 * Prepare monthly quality reports and quality KPI dashboards.
 * Handle customer complaints and ensure corrective & preventive actions (CAPA).
   
   

Job Specifications


 * B.Tech / M.Tech in Food Technology, Food Science, Biotechnology, or related field.
 * 5–7 years of experience in QA/QC/R&D in food processing industry.
 * Experience with cereals, extruded snacks, flour milling, or maize products (preferred).
 * Expertise in lab testing, SPC, process validation, and root cause analysis.
 * Experience in product development and formulation.
 * Familiarity with multi-head packing lines, milling processes, extrusion, etc. (as relevant).
   
   

Skills: milling,lab testing,product development,food safety

title: Senior QA & QC Engineer

description:
🚀 We’re Hiring! 🚀




We're on the lookout for talented senior-level professionals to join our growing engineering team.




📝 We are pleased to invite eligible candidates to our Written Test Event, which marks the first step of our structured technical hiring process. This test is designed to assess key technical competencies aligned with the roles we are hiring for.




📌 Eligibility Criteria:

Candidates must have at least 6 years of hands-on experience in the respective field and technology stack.




Overview:

The Senior Quality Engineer is responsible for writing automated tests within Viveka’s standard testing framework and reviewing and remediating junior developers’ testing, composing test data and writing mock services as necessary for the team. The successful candidate has a strong understanding of the business objectives of the product and the new features and can understand and exercise those in the context of managing the test plan and while defining and creating test data. The candidate evangelizes all published Viveka QA procedures and standards and leads in knowledge and customization of the testing infrastructure and tools that are used by the department. Engineers are accountable for the tests of their juniors and their own, and for test data being realistic to the business and covering the business acceptance criteria, and the published test plan and producing reporting at the standards of the organization.




Who You Are:

An accomplished quality engineering professional with a proven track record in designing advanced testing frameworks, driving QA strategy, and mentoring teams. You are an expert in test automation, risk analysis, and implementing AI-driven testing solutions. You thrive on solving complex challenges, improving processes, and aligning QA efforts with organizational goals. Your strategic mindset, leadership skills, and technical expertise make you a critical driver of software quality and team success.




Supervisor: The Senior Quality Engineer reports to the Team Quality Lead.




ACCOUNTABILITY

You are accountable for ensuring and providing artifacts and evidence of the following:

● Own tests cover all the acceptance criteria and are composed properly as per QA

standards and policies.

● The test plan, manual test output, and automated test reporting of more junior developers is reviewed and certified




RESPONSIBILITY

You are responsible for carrying out the following with timeliness and quality:

● Maintain our test automation framework and processes tailored to the specific product’s needs.

● Define and implement overall testing strategies for projects, ensuring alignment with business goals.

● Provide guidance, mentorship, and support to the junior Quality Engineers to ensure efficient execution of their duties.

● Manage the execution of automated test cases and review junior developers

conducting manual testing.

● Conduct performance and load testing, analyze results and recommend

improvements.

● Identify inefficiencies in our testing process and suggest enhancements.

● Determine testing priorities and decide whether testing activities should be manual, automated, or non-functional.

● Help prepare and maintain the test plan to meet project requirements and expectations.

● Compose test data that represents all the test cases and the test plan, and that is representative of our real customer data.

● Update and review regression test cases after each release, incorporating new features and enhancements.

● Execute tests and present demos to the Product Owner.




SUCCESS

Your success will be measured by the completeness and correctness of the delivered software as compared with the acceptance criteria, and you adhering to Viveka’s published QA standards, processes, and tools as they execute the test plans and report the results.




📬 How to Participate:

Please email your resume to careers@vivekahealth.com. Our HR team will screen all applications, and if you qualify, you’ll receive a personal invitation to attend the 120-minute written test.




Candidates who clear the written test will proceed to the technical round, followed by the final executive round. Successful candidates will then receive an offer.

🫖 Light refreshments (tea, coffee, biscuits, candies) will be served for your comfort during the session.




We’re excited to meet professionals who are passionate about building, solving, and making a meaningful impact.




Viveka Employee Benefits

At Viveka, we’re more than just a workplace, we’re a team that grows, celebrates, and succeeds together. When you join us, you’ll be part of a supportive culture that values well-being, performance, and fun.

Comprehensive Insurance Coverage – We’ve got your back with additional accidental insurance (employee only) and medical insurance (family floater) on top of the Social Security Fund (SSF) for your added peace of mind.

Festival Allowance – Celebrate the moments that matter with extra support during festive seasons. Once in a year, is prorated and eligible from 1 day of probation.

Performance Bonuses – Your hard work won’t go unnoticed, we reward great performance with competitive bonuses.

Team Bonding – Regular team-building activities, outings, and hiking adventures keep our team energized and connected.

Lunch on Us – Enjoy delicious, company-provided lunches so you can stay focused and fueled.

Refreshment Corner – Unlimited tea and coffee are available anytime, along with complimentary biscuits, candies, and chocolates to keep your energy up throughout the day.

Indoor Games & Fun Breaks – Recharge during lunch or breaks with a variety of indoor games including table-tennis, carrom, chess, snake & ladder, checkers, darts, and more because we believe great ideas are born when you’re having fun.

Competitive Salary – We offer market-competitive pay to recognize your skills and contributions.

A Culture That Cares – We value people over hierarchy, growth over routine, and collaboration over silos.

Leave Encashment - Both Home leave and Sick leave balance can be encashed at the end of every fiscal year.

Retirement funds - (Social Security Fund (SSF) + Gratuity) and Contribution funds (CIT) for tax savings

Payroll account at a reputed Bank - Employees are eligible to apply for a personal loan of a maximum of NPR 15 lakhs without any collateral.

description:
Position Summary

Reasons You Will Want This Position

Summary

Cedar Gate Services is looking for Software QA Engineer 1 to join our team. This role is instrumental in ensuring the quality, accuracy, and performance of our US healthcare IT solutions. As a Software QA Engineer, you will engage in both manual and automated testing, analyze business and data requirements, and collaborate with cross-functional teams to support quality assurance initiatives and continuous process improvement

Roles & Responsibilities


 * Analyze business and data requirements
 * Conduct both manual and automated testing
 * Prepare and review test data
 * Report defects and provide updates on test status
 * Assist in documenting software and data quality processes, test cases, and outcomes
 * Help prepare quality metrics and progress reports for internal stakeholders
 * Learn and implement quality assurance best practices, contributing to process improvement initiatives
 * Collaborate with team members to enhance software and data quality assurance workflows and procedures
   
   

Required Experience / Qualifications


 * Bachelor's degree or equivalent in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field
 * 2+ year of relevant experience
 * Knowledge of at least one DBMS
 * Strong attention to detail with an analytical and problem-solving mindset
 * Excellent communication and collaboration skills for effective cross-functional teamwork
 * Eagerness to learn, adapt, and grow within a data-focused environment
   
   

Nice to Have


 * Experience in the US healthcare domain and claim payment processes
 * Familiarity with industry standards such as HIPAA regulations and healthcare claims processing systems
   
   

Your Future Working Environment

If you join Cedar Gate, you can make great ideas happen for some of the world's most dynamic companies. With broad global resources and deep technical know-how, we collaborate with clients to cultivate ideas and deliver results in the medical industry. Choose a career at Cedar Gate and enjoy an innovative environment where challenging and interesting work is part of daily life.

Next to our excellent terms of employment and fringe benefits, we invest considerable resources to provide ongoing training that builds and extends professional, technical, and management skills in all areas. At Cedar Gate, you will operate in a professional environment where teamwork and innovation are immensely encouraged. Together with colleagues, you will work on high-impact projects for many dynamic companies.

About Cedar Gate

Cedar Gate enables payers, providers, employers, and service administrators to excel at value-based care. Our unified technology and services platform enhances and automates data management activities to deliver employer and provider analytics, care management, and payment technology necessary to pursue every payment model and optimize performance in all lines of business. From primary care attribution to bundled payments to capitation, our platform is designed to improve clinical, financial, and operational outcomes for all.

Cedar Gate Services  Pvt. Ltd, Nepal, provides software research & development, data analytics, IT infrastructure management and various support services for Cedar Gate Technologies, USA. We employ 750+ professionals in our Sanepa  office. For more information, visit company website at  https://cedargate.com/  and follow our FB page at  https://www.facebook.com/CGTNepal .
