Trending

Job Info


 * Job Identification 31104
 * Posting Date 01/27/2026, 05:51 AM
 * Apply Before 02/11/2026, 04:59 AM
 * Job Schedule Full time
 * Locations Kathmandu, Nepal
 * Agency UNDP
 * Grade NPSA-10
 * Vacancy Type National Personnel Service Agreement
 * Practice Area Disaster Risk Reduction and Recovery
 * Contract Duration 1 Year
 * Education & Work Experience Master's Degree - 5 year(s) experience OR Bachelor's Degree - 7 year(s) experience
 * Required Languages English and Nepali
 * Vacancy Timeline 1 Week
   
   

Job Description

Background

While climate change is observed across Nepal, the rate of temperature increase is more pronounced at higher altitudes. This temperature rise accelerates the rate of glacial retreat, increasing the size of glacial lakes located in these high-altitude areas and, in turn, their likelihood of breaching in the form of Glacial Lake Outburst Floods (GLOF) which cause severe flooding, landslides and mudflows that damage infrastructure and private assets, and disrupt transportation networks, agricultural production, power supplies from hydropower plants and tourism activities. Damages from GLOFs are often irreparable for decades, with considerable economic costs, particularly to downstream populations. The risk of GLOFs is further exacerbated by increasing temperatures which increase the rate of snow and ice melt and the proportion of precipitation falling as rain, which increases the volume of the lakes, thereby reducing the amount of ‘freeboard’, which increases the likelihood of overflow and the intensity of resulting floods.

The Thulagi, Lower Barun, Lumding Tsho and Hongu 2 Lakes are at exceptionally high risk of breaching having already exhibited considerable increases in volume, accelerated degradation of their ice-cored moraines, and a reduced amount of ‘freeboard’ as a result of climate change. Combined, these factors have destabilized the lakes, exposing the Gandaki Basin and the Dudhkoshi and Arun Sub-basins to the threat of a GLOF event. Without intervention, these glacial lakes could breach at any given moment, adversely impacting vulnerable Nepalese communities.

In response to this risk, USD36 millions of GCF funds, alongside USD14 million in cofinance, will be directed to reduce the risk and impacts of GLOFs at the four priority glacial lakes by shifting towards a proactive approach to GLOF risk reduction in Nepal. The proposed project presents an integrated approach to GLOF risk management in Nepal by addressing institutional and technical capacities, physical protection (both grey and green infrastructure approaches), hazard monitoring and early warning. This integrated approach will utilise GCF funds to: i) lower the water levels of four glacial lakes to reduce their risk of breaching; ii) implement Eco-Disaster Risk Reduction interventions in mountain ecosystems to mitigate the residual flood impacts from a GLOF; iii) establish and implement early warning systems to alleviate damages and prevent the loss of lives from GLOFs; and iv) strengthen the technical and institutional capacity of Nepal’s Department of Hydrology and Meteorology to plan for and respond to GLOFs and floods. These interventions will catalyse a shift from a need- and project-based approach towards proactive and pre-emptive approaches, engendered through strengthened capacity among institutions and communities.

The project will be implemented following UNDP’s support to National Implementation Modality (NIM), with Department of Hydrology and Meteorology (DHM) under Ministry of Energy, Water Resources and Irrigation (MoEWRI) of Nepal serving as the Implementing Partner. Under this modality, UNDP is supporting DHM in recruiting key positions for the establishment of a Project Management Unit, which will be based in Kathmandu, Nepal. Members of the PMU will collectively be responsible for overall planning and budgeting, collaborating with other ministries, sectors and government entities to implement the project performance management system; bidding for the provision of project consultancy services; coordination with the responsible parties in terms of bidding of goods and services; disbursement and implementation of project audits, operation of accounts, monitoring and preparation of overall project reports (annual), and safeguards policy monitoring reports.

Duties And Responsibilities

The PMU will be headed by the Project Coordination Specialist (PCS). The PCS will report directly to the Chief Technical Advisor and work on day-to-day basis with Portfolio Manager (Resilience and Environment) and Programme Analyst (Climate Change and Resilience). The PMU will operate under the overall guidance of the National Project Director (NPD) — as assigned by MoEWRI.

The Project Coordination Specialist (PCS) will lead the project management unit and oversee day-to-day implementation under the guidance of the Project Board (PB) for Nepal. The PCS will be responsible for ensuring that project results are delivered in line with the approved project document, meeting agreed standards of quality, timeframes, and budget. Key duties include preparing annual work plans and budgets for Board approval, as well as quarterly and annual progress reports outlining achievements, challenges, and necessary adjustments. The PCS will manage procurement and recruitment of national and international service providers and specialist expertise in consultation with the Board. Given that the project is implemented in partnership with the Government of Nepal and various stakeholders, the PCS will also play a central role in coordinating the efforts of all partners to ensure coherent and effective delivery. The PCS function will end when the final project terminal evaluation report and other documentation required by the GCF and UNDP have been completed and submitted to UNDP (including operational closure of the project).

The Project Coordination Specialist will be responsible for the following key functions:

Project Management


 * Develop annual work plans, budgets, and targets in line with the Project Document and Board guidance.
 * Monitor progress against plans, identify bottlenecks, and propose corrective measures to ensure timely delivery.
 * Support the Project Board with regular updates, background materials, and reporting for decision-making.
 * Lead and supervise the Project Management Unit, setting clear objectives and providing performance guidance.
 * Oversee procurement, contracting, and recruitment processes, including drafting TORs and technical specifications.
 * Prepare and maintain accurate accounting records in line with UNDP and GCF requirements.
 * Ensure the effective and accountable use of project resources in line with GCF/UNDP standards.
 * In collaboration with other PMU members, draft Terms of Reference (TORs), technical specifications, and related documentation to guide procurement and recruitment processes.
 * Identify, contract, and supervise consultants, suppliers, and service providers to ensure quality and timely delivery of outputs.
 * Coordinate and oversee the timely execution of project activities by the PMU, consultants, and suppliers.
 * Monitor the quality of technical outputs, ensuring compliance with approved standards.
 * Support oversight of cross-cutting requirements such as the Environmental and Social Management Framework and Gender Action Plan.
 * Establish and maintain systems for monitoring progress, risks, and results.
 * Prepare quarterly operational and annual progress reports for submission to the Project Board and UNDP.
 * Support audits and ensure timely follow-up on recommendations.
   
   

Coordination, Partnerships And Stakeholder Engagement


 * Serve as the central point of coordination and maintain strong working relationships with project partners at national, state, and community levels, ensuring effective liaison with government counterparts, UN agencies, and other responsible parties involved in implementation.
 * Liaise closely with Responsible Parties for the implementation of specific interventions.
 * Facilitate the technical advisory group and ensure effective inputs are integrated into project delivery.
   
   

Communications And Knowledge Management


 * Maintain regular communication with Government, national stakeholders, and partners on project progress and emerging issues.
 * Support project visibility and communications activities in coordination with UNDP and national partners.
 * Act as a focal point for stakeholder feedback and local concerns related to project activities.
 * Promote knowledge exchange and capacity development with Government counterparts and local stakeholders.
 * Document and disseminate lessons learned and best practices within Nepal and across region.
   
   

Capacity Building


 * Facilitate linkages with regional and international platforms to draw on global expertise and share project experiences.
 * Coordinate the design and implementation of the project’s capacity development activities, ensuring alignment with national priorities and project outcomes.
 * Ensure that technical service providers incorporate on-the-job training and knowledge transfer components into their workplans and deliverables.
 * Promote local ownership and sustainability by supporting institutionalization of new tools, systems, and standard operating procedures developed under the project.
 * Coordinate documentation of lessons learned, training materials, and best practices, and support dissemination across national and regional platforms.
   
   

Mainstreaming Gender Equality And Social Inclusion


 * Ensure mainstreaming of Gender Equality and Social Inclusion (GESI) principles throughout project planning, implementation, monitoring, and reporting in line with national policies and Green Climate Fund (GCF) gender and social safeguards requirements.
 * Facilitate the integration of gender-responsive and inclusive climate actions in project interventions, ensuring that women, indigenous peoples, persons with disabilities, and marginalized groups actively participate and benefit equitably.
 * Coordinate with GESI experts and technical teams to develop and implement the project’s Gender and Social Inclusion Action Plan (GESIAP) and monitor progress against its targets and indicators.
 * Promote capacity development on GESI and climate resilience for project staff, implementing partners, and local stakeholders, ensuring inclusive participation and gender-balanced representation.
 * Ensure that data collection and reporting are sex-, age-, and disability-disaggregated, and that progress reports adequately reflect gender equality and social inclusion outcomes.
 * Identify and address potential gender and social risks associated with project activities, proposing mitigation measures in coordination with relevant stakeholders.
 * Support the documentation and dissemination of good practices, lessons learned, and success stories that highlight gender-responsive and socially inclusive climate actions.
   
   

The incumbent performs other duties within their functional profile as deemed necessary for the efficient functioning of the Office and the Organization.

Competencies

Core Competencies


 * Achieve Results: LEVEL 3: Set and align challenging, achievable objectives for multiple projects, have lasting impact
 * Think Innovatively: LEVEL 3: Proactively mitigate potential risks, develop new ideas to solve complex problems
 * Learn Continuously: LEVEL 3: Create and act on opportunities to expand horizons, diversify experiences
 * Adapt with Agility: LEVEL 3: Proactively initiate and champion change, manage multiple competing demands
 * Act with Determination: LEVEL 3: Think beyond immediate task/barriers and take action to achieve greater results
 * Engage and Partner: LEVEL 3: Political savvy, navigate complex landscape, champion inter-agency collaboration
 * Enable Diversity and Inclusion: LEVEL 3: Appreciate benefits of diverse workforce and champion inclusivity
   
   

People Management (Insert below standard sentence if the position has direct reports.)

to People Management Competencies


 * UNDP People Management Competencies can be found in the dedicated site.
   
   

Cross-Functional & Technical Competencies

2030 Agenda: Planet


 * Disaster Risk Reduction and Recovery. Early Warning, Anticipation and Preparedness. Mainstreaming/Integrating Disaster Risk Reduction and Climate Adaptation into Development. Risk Governance: Disaster and Climate Risk Governance
   
   

Procurement


 * Strategic sourcing. Knowledge of strategic sourcing concepts, principles and methods, and ability to apply this to strategic and/or practical situations
   
   

Business Management


 * Project Management. Ability to plan, organize, prioritize and control resources, procedures and protocols to achieve specific goals
 * Partnerships Management. Build and maintain partnerships with wide networks of stakeholders, Governments, civil society and private sector partners, experts and others in line with UNDP strategy and policies
 * Risk Management. Identify and organize action around reducing, mitigating and proactively managing risks 2030 Agenda: People Gender Innovation for Gender Equality
   
   

Business Direction & Strategy


 * System Thinking. Ability to use objective problem analysis and judgement to understand how interrelated elements coexist within an overall process or system, and to consider how altering one element can impact on other parts of the system
   
   

Education

Required Skills and Experience


 * Advanced University Degree (Master s degree or equivalent ) in Environmental Management, Development Studies, Project Management, Business or Public Sector Administration, International Relations, Political Science, or other relevant discipline or
 * A first-level university degree (bachelor’s degree) in the above-mentioned fields in combination with an additional 2 years of relevant experience will be given due consideration in lieu of the advanced university degree.
   
   

Experience


 * A minimum of 5 years (with a master’s degree) or 7 years (with a bachelor’s degree) of relevant experience in project implementation and management, with a focus on planning, monitoring, reporting, and stakeholder and team coordination.
   
   

Required Skills


 * Good computer literacy – MS office applications, web-based management information systems.
 * Highly organized with strong ability to set priorities, deliver quality outputs, meet deadlines, and manage time effectively.
 * Proactive and self-motivated, with the ability to maintain an overview in complex work situations.
 * Strong analytical skills with the ability to gather, process, and interpret data and information.
 * Excellent interpersonal skills for effective networking within the national team and with external institutions
 * Clear and effective communicator, maintaining professionalism in both written and verbal correspondence with diverse stakeholders.
   
   

Desired skills in addition to the competencies covered in the Competencies section:


 * Technical experience with early warning systems, emergency communications, disaster risk reduction and management, anticipatory action and climate change adaptation is highly desirable;
 * Prior experience in managing high-value, donor-funded projects is highly desirable.
 * Extensive managerial experience, including experience in leading multi-cultural teams, is highly desirable.
 * Demonstrated leadership in multi-stakeholder coordination (government, civil society, private sector, and international organizations) is highly desirable.
 * Strong project management skills (planning, implementation, monitoring, and reporting) are highly desirable.
 * Ability to draft high-quality reports, policy briefs, and official communications.
 * Budget management and oversight experience are highly desirable.
 * Familiarity with government procedures, donor compliance requirements, and project governance frameworks is highly desirable.
 * Prior experience with UNDP projects would be an asset.
 * Proven experience in working with government counterparts, donors, and development partners at policy/strategic level is highly desirable.
   
   

Required Language(s)


 * Good command of English and Nepali is required.
   
   

Equal opportunity

As an equal opportunity employer, UNDP values diversity as an expression of the multiplicity of nations and cultures where we operate and, as such, we encourage qualified applicants from all backgrounds to apply for roles in the organization. Our employment decisions are based on merit and suitability for the role, without discrimination.

UNDP is also committed to creating an inclusive workplace where all personnel are empowered to contribute to our mission, are valued, can thrive, and benefit from career opportunities that are open to all.

Sexual harassment, exploitation, and abuse of authority

UNDP does not tolerate harassment, sexual harassment, exploitation, discrimination and abuse of authority. All selected candidates, therefore, undergo relevant checks and are expected to adhere to the respective standards and principles.

Right to select multiple candidates

UNDP reserves the right to select one or more candidates from this vacancy announcement. We may also retain applications and consider candidates applying to this post for other similar positions with UNDP at the same grade level and with similar job description, experience and educational requirements.

Scam alert

UNDP does not charge a fee at any stage of its recruitment process. For further information, please see www.undp.org/scam-alert.

About Us

SoftNEP is a dynamic and innovative software solutions provider dedicated to crafting cutting-edge applications that elevate user experiences. We thrive on creativity, collaboration, and excellence in all that we do. As a Quality Assurance Engineer, you'll play a crucial role in upholding our commitment to delivering software solutions of the highest caliber. Learn about the company here.

Role And Responsibilities

As a Quality Assurance Engineer at SoftNEP, you will:


 * Develop comprehensive and well-structured test plans, test cases, and test scripts to ensure software quality.
 * Collaborate with cross-functional teams, including developers and product managers, to understand project requirements and design effective testing strategies.
 * Execute both manual and automated tests to identify and report defects, ensuring robust functionality and performance of our software.
 * Continuously improve testing processes and methodologies, driving efficiency and accuracy.
 * Analyze and troubleshoot complex technical issues, collaborating with teams to identify root causes and propose solutions.
 * Contribute to the enhancement of our QA processes and standards, promoting a culture of quality throughout the organization.
   
   

Qualifications


 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or any IT related field.
 * Proven experience as a Quality Assurance Engineer or similar role, demonstrating a track record of successful software testing and defect identification.
 * Solid understanding of software development life cycles, testing methodologies, and best practices.
 * Proficiency in using testing tools and frameworks, both manual and automated.
 * Experience with performance and/or security testing will be a plus.
 * Good knowledge in Git version control system.
 * Working knowledge of Laravel and React.

 * Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with an eye for detail.

description:
Role overview

We are looking for an Embedded Software Engineer to join the core development team and lead the firmware layer that connects our hardware security engine to drone communication and telemetry workflows.

You will own critical real-time communication, reliability, and integration work across microcontrollers, radio links, and FPGA interfaces




Key responsibilities

Develop and maintain firmware for microcontroller-based bridging and control functions in the product

Implement, debug, and optimize real-time data exchange between system components

Design robust framing, CRC, error handling, and state-machine logic for embedded communication links

Integrate secure telemetry and security alerts into operational data flows and ensure reliable delivery to ground control workflows

Implement logging, diagnostics, and event capture features to support investigation, recovery, and continuous reliability improvement

Work closely with FPGA and hardware engineers to define interface requirements, timing constraints, and test plans

Build unit and integration test suites for firmware, including simulated fault and attack scenarios




Must have:

4+ years of hands-on embedded development in C or C++

Strong experience with microcontroller peripherals such as UART, SPI, I2C, timers, and interrupts

Proven experience implementing embedded communication protocols with CRC, error recovery, and deterministic timing

Solid understanding of real-time constraints, performance tradeoffs, and resource-aware design

Experience with embedded debugging and firmware build and flash workflows on Linux




Nice to have:

Experience with FreeRTOS or similar RTOS

Experience working on drone platforms or with flight-controller communication stacks

Familiarity with MAVLink-based serial interfaces and constrained embedded links

Exposure to FPGA-adjacent system integration and hardware-software co-design

Background in embedded security, secure boot, or root of trust concepts

description:
Job Description

Job Title: Senior QA Engineer

Experience: 5+ years in Quality Assurance (with at least 3+ years in test automation or combined development and testing)

Location: Kathmandu

Employment Type: Full-time

Role Overview

We are seeking a highly skilled Senior QA Engineer to join our team and ensure the delivery of high-quality, reliable software solutions. The ideal candidate will have deep expertise in data testing, automation frameworks, and quality engineering practices, with a strong focus on data platforms and big data ecosystems.

Key Responsibilities


 * Design and implement test strategies, frameworks, and best practices for both manual and automated testing.
 * Develop robust test suites, including test plans, use cases, and scripts to identify defects and validate solution integrity.
 * Configure and maintain test environments and generate comprehensive test data sets.
 * Perform feature-level testing, regression testing, and maintain regression test suites.
 * Accurately report defects and manage issue tracking through resolution.
 * Define and monitor quality metrics for data pipelines, products, and deliverables.
 * Collaborate closely with development engineers, TPOs, and data engineers to deliver reliable data ingestion and distribution platforms.
 * Research and adopt new tools and technologies to enhance QA processes.
   
   

Required Skills & Qualifications


 * Strong proficiency in SQL (joins, subqueries, window functions, aggregations, analytical queries).
 * Hands-on experience with ETL tools (e.g., Informatica, DataStage, Talend, Pentaho, SSIS).
 * Solid understanding of relational databases (Oracle, Teradata, PostgreSQL, SQL Server, MySQL).
 * Knowledge of data warehousing concepts (dimensions, facts, SCD, star/snowflake schema).
 * Ability to analyze large datasets and identify data quality issues.
 * Experience with test management tools (Jira X-ray, ALM, qTest, Zephyr).
 * Strong problem-solving and logical thinking skills for complex data flows.
 * Excellent communication and collaboration skills.
 * Proficiency in Python for test automation.
 * Familiarity with big data ecosystems (Spark, Hive, HDFS) – optional but a plus.
 * Strong sense of ownership and accountability.
   
   

Preferred Experience


 * Hands-on testing experience with Hadoop, Spark, and other big data platforms.
 * Programming or scripting skills in Scala, Python, Java.
 * Proven track record in automated testing using tools like Selenium.
 * Experience with JIRA or similar defect tracking systems.
 * Exceptional analytical and problem-solving abilities.

description:
Job Title:

Full Stack Software Engineer




Job Summary:

We are seeking an experienced Full Stack Software Engineer with strong frontend and backend expertise to join our team and drive the development of scalable, distributed software solutions. You will play a crucial role in architecting and implementing our GraphQL-based microservices infrastructure, while collaborating with cross-functional teams to deliver robust enterprise applications from conceptualization through deployment.




Job Description:

As a Full Stack Software Engineer with, you will be responsible for designing and implementing sophisticated distributed systems and GraphQL APIs that power our applications. Your responsibilities will include:

 * Actively develop and deliver production-ready code in TypeScript/JavaScript, with emphasis on backend services using Node.js and NestJS / React.js frameworks.
 * Architect and implement GraphQL APIs.
 * Develop reusable frontend components with Next.js when needed, ensuring seamless integration with GraphQL APIs using Apollo Client.
 * Develop and maintain efficient database schemas using Prisma ORM, working with MongoDB, MySQL, and implementing Redis for caching strategies.
 * Build scalable backend services with NestJS/Express.js, implementing proper authentication, authorization, and security best practices.
 * Create optimized GraphQL schemas following best practices for type design, pagination, error handling, and field-level caching strategies.
 * Implement comprehensive testing strategies including unit tests, integration tests, and GraphQL-specific testing for resolvers and schema validation.
 * Deploy and manage applications on Google Cloud Platform (GCP) using services like Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Pub/Sub, and Cloud SQL.
 * Optimize query performance using DataLoader patterns, query complexity analysis, and implement proper caching strategies at multiple levels.
 * Design and implement CI/CD pipelines for automated testing and deployment across multiple environments.
 * Monitor and optimize application performance, implementing observability and tracing for distributed GraphQL services.
 * Collaborate with teams to ensure optimal API design and efficient data fetching patterns.
 * Maintain clear documentation for GraphQL schemas, API contracts, and architectural decisions.




Job Specification:

Required Skills and Expertise:

 * Education: Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Technology, Software Engineering, or a related field.
 * Experience: 3+ years of experience as a Full Stack Software Engineer.
 * Programming Languages: Expert proficiency in TypeScript/JavaScript for fullstack development.
 * Frontend Framework: Experience with Next.js for full-stack applications is preferred. Understanding of React.js and server-side rendering concepts.
 * Backend Frameworks: Strong hands-on experience with NestJS or Express.js for building scalable Node.js applications. NestJS expertise is highly preferred.
 * GraphQL experience: Experience with Apollo GraphQL ecosystem is required with experience using it in the frontend and backend.
 * Database & ORM: Proficiency with Prisma ORM is required. Strong experience with MongoDB and MySQL databases. Redis implementation for caching and session management.
 * Cloud Services: Hands-on experience with Google Cloud Platform (GCP) including Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, Cloud SQL, Pub/Sub, Cloud Storage, and Firebase/Firestore.
 * Testing: Comprehensive knowledge of testing methodologies including unit testing, integration testing, and GraphQL-specific testing strategies using Jest, Supertest, and Apollo testing utilities.
 * DevOps & Deployment: Experience with Docker containerization, Kubernetes orchestration, and implementing CI/CD pipelines using tools like GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, or Google Cloud Build.
 * API Design: Strong understanding of RESTful API design principles and GraphQL best practices, including versioning strategies and backward compatibility.
 * Security: Solid understanding of web application security, OWASP guidelines, JWT authentication, and GraphQL-specific security considerations.
 * Performance Optimization: Experience with application profiling, database query optimization, caching strategies, and distributed system performance tuning.




Preferred Qualifications:

 * Experience with microservices architecture and event-driven systems
 * Knowledge of message queuing systems (RabbitMQ, Google Pub/Sub)
 * Familiarity with monitoring tools (Datadog, New Relic, or Google Cloud Monitoring)

Candidates who possess a combination of these qualifications, are passionate about software development, and are eager to contribute to our dynamic team are encouraged to apply.




What We're Looking For:

We need someone who is passionate about fullstack engineering and has deep expertise in building scalable GraphQL services with experience in Prisma, Node.js, NestJS, React.js, and NextJS.




Candidates who possess these qualifications, and are eager to work on challenging distributed systems are encouraged to apply.




Application Procedure:

 1. Email your application and resume to careers@maitriservices.com
 2. Mention “Full stack Software Engineer” in the email subject.

description:
Your Contribution


 * Oversee the quality assurance processes for both internal and customer-facing software projects, ensuring adherence to industry standards and best practices.
 * Design, develop, and execute comprehensive test plans, incorporating both manual and automated testing methodologies. Maintain and evolve test frameworks to improve efficiency and accuracy in testing.
 * Preparation, execution, documentation, and communication of tests.
 * Actively participate in the continuous improvement of test methods, processes, and tools. Regularly share best practices and contribute to the development of standardized procedures.
 * Foster close collaboration between project teams, IT architects, and project management to align quality assurance objectives with project goals.
   
   

Your Day-to-Day Tasks


 * Gather requirement specifications. Work closely with stakeholders to gather comprehensive requirement specifications.
 * Create detailed documentation of test plans, test cases, and testing results. Communicate findings effectively to relevant stakeholders.
 * Engage with development teams to ensure a clear understanding of software requirements and functionalities.
 * Perform exploratory testing with a focus on identifying and documenting defects.
 * Review defects and test logs to identify root causes and suggest solutions for improving testing, documentation, and process improvement.
 * Develop, write, and execute test conditions and test cases, utilizing both manual and automated testing methodologies.
 * Run test cases (manual, automated, or both).
 * Discover bugs and report them.
 * Performance tests.
 * Security tests.
   
   

Your Skills & Qualifications


 * Bachelor's degree in Software Engineering, Computer Science, or comparable experience.
 * Minimum 4+ years of experience as a Software Quality Engineer.
 * Experience with test automation and associated tools and methods.
 * Quality- and customer-oriented, ability to work independently, excellent interpersonal skills, with a positive and cooperative attitude.
 * Entrepreneurial thinking, organizational, and multitasking skills.
 * Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities, coupled with entrepreneurial thinking and exceptional organizational multitasking and leadership skills.
 * Able to leverage AI tools for testing efficiency.
 * Update and review the regression test cases after each release.
 * Provide guidance, mentorship, and support to fellow QA team members to ensure efficient execution of their duties.
 * Strong attention to detail.
 * Fluency in English, with excellent written and verbal communication skills.
   
   

Why us?

Are you eager to cut through the noise and bureaucracy of corporate software development? Or just want to make a name for yourself in a dynamic team environment? Or perhaps looking for a reason to sharpen all of your skills? Anyone interested in cutting-edge web and service-based development and quality management is welcome. ITONICS is looking for an enthusiastic Software Quality Engineer to join our team.

ITONICS is offering

A position with an established leader of innovation and strategic management enterprise software/solutions. Alright, that sounds boring so far, but we are not focusing on millions of customers loving our location-based dating app. We make market-leading companies in all industries even stronger by boosting their innovation and strategic functions. This requires lots of solid development work and even more magic. If you are the type of person who has fun with testing complex but innovative applications - let’s talk! At ITONICS you’ll be part of the industrial dawn of innovation through insight and collaboration. Building large-scale solutions to answer both demanding high-level and concrete questions about the future. Welcoming experienced quality engineers with various levels of savviness and focus, ITONICS has a place for anyone who is devoted to technology and forward-thinking. The ITONICS team is looking for eager and self-motivated individuals to drive solutions into the future.

Please ONLY apply if you are available to undertake the position onsite in Kathmandu, Nepal. Grab the chance to work in one of the most exciting and innovative areas in the industry in one of the most exciting cities on the globe - NOW!

Company Benefits


 * A friendly, competitive, and creative working environment.
 * Competitive salary (Greater than the market for deserving candidates).
 * Enjoy a balanced work-life schedule with a 5-day work week.
 * Powerful Laptops that you can also carry home.
 * Opportunities for professional growth and advancement.
 * Health and wellness benefits.
 * Free lunch and snacks.
 * Regular refreshment, recreational, and team-building events.
 * Birthdays and Work Anniversary celebrations.
 * Rewards and bonuses based on performance.
 * Referral bonus.
 * Social Security Fund.
 * Health and Domiciliary insurance.
 * Fringe benefits (Fuel voucher/ supermarket voucher/ phone cost cover).
 * Extra activity: Cricket and Futsal every week, and a variety of indoor games in the office.
 * A highly motivated team that fosters active communication and knowledge sharing.
   
   

Note:


 * Salary Provided Based on Experience. No bar for Deserving Candidate
 * Candidates who have previously applied for a job at ITONICS but were not shortlisted for interviews are also encouraged to apply
 * Come on board! Our Kathmandu office is based in a town in a new and modern office building, providing a world-class working environment and offering you a handsome salary
   
   

About Us

ITONICS is a leading provider of SaaS innovation solutions, empowering organizations to anticipate and shape their futures. Our Innovation OS combines +15 years of specialist experience in end-to-end innovation management with cutting-edge technologies to streamline how global businesses manage, scale, and execute their growth strategies. With more than 150 experts worldwide, we support innovation leaders such as adidas, Johnson & Johnson, Toyota, Mondelez, Siemens, and KPMG. Our diverse, high-performing teams across inspiring global locations thrive on a culture of collaboration, bold thinking, and continuous growth. We’re not just building a platform; we’re shaping the future of innovation.

ITONICS is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal-opportunity employer. We are dedicated to attracting and retaining the most qualified employees regardless of race, national origin, religion, sexual orientation, gender, age, or disability. ITONICS offers competitive salaries benchmarked against international industry standards. We rely on legitimate interest as a legal basis for processing personal information under the GDPR for recruitment and employment applications.

For more, visit our careers page.

We’re not just building functionality — we’re crafting experiences. That’s where you come in.




The Role




We're looking for a Front-End Developer with a designer’s eye — someone who lives and breathes pixels, layout, spacing, and UX patterns. You will own the UI implementation of our dashboards and fintech tools using React + TypeScript, working hand-in-hand with our designers and backend engineers.

If you love design systems, dashboard layouts, micro-interactions, and translating Figma files into crisp, responsive React components — this role is for you.




What You’ll Do




 * Translate Figma designs into clean, responsive, component-based React UIs
 * Build beautiful dashboard layouts with grids, modals, sidebars, tables, and charts
 * Maintain pixel-perfect alignment, spacing, and typography across the product
 * Create and manage a component library and contribute to our evolving design system
 * Implement micro-animations, hover states, and intuitive UX interactions
 * Collaborate with product and backend teams to make sure interfaces feel fast and intuitive

Tech Stack

 * React + TypeScript
 * Tailwind CSS or styled-components (or CSS Modules)
 * Figma for designs
 * REST / GraphQL APIs
 * GitHub + CI/CD pipelines
 * Bonus: D3.js / Chart.js / Recharts for visualizations




What You Bring




 * 3+ years in React front-end development
 * Strong understanding of responsive layouts, flex/grid, and modern UI architecture
 * Passion for clean, consistent, detail-oriented UI
 * You care about line height, border-radius, and semantic HTML
 * Experience working closely with Figma files
 * Familiarity with design systems and building UI kits
 * Bonus: You’ve built or contributed to a dashboard, admin panel, or data-heavy UI




Why Join Tirnu




 * Build the UI of a new financial platform from scratch
 * Direct impact on product experience and design language
 * Work with a passionate, fast-moving team in fintech and Web3
title: Front-End Developer (React / UI-Focused)

description:
Dignep Group Pvt. Ltd. is a technology solutions company that combines cutting-edge innovation with deep understanding of people and processes to deliver impactful digital products. We partner with startups scaling their vision and enterprises evolving their capabilities building software the startup way. Our offerings span bespoke software development, dedicated teams, staff augmentation, and AI-powered solutions.




PURPOSE

The Senior Cloud Data Engineer will design, build, and maintain scalable cloud data platforms that power Dignep's internal analytics and client-facing data solutions. This role is central to enabling data-driven product development and delivering enterprise-grade data engineering services to our clients. You will architect and implement modern data ecosystems including data warehouses, lakes, and AI/ML pipelines that accelerate digital transformation for startups and enterprises alike.




TECHNICAL SKILLS

Cloud Data Engineering

 * Enterprise-level experience in cloud data architecture covering data warehouses, data lakes, data marts, and operational data stores
 * Expertise in batch and real-time data ingestion using Azure Data Factory (ADF), Snowflake, AWS Glue, or Informatica IICS
 * Hands-on skills building, deploying, and monitoring scalable ETL/ELT pipelines within the Azure ecosystem

Azure Ecosystem

 * Deep proficiency in Azure Data Lake, Azure Synapse Analytics, Azure SQL Database, Azure Blob Storage, and Azure ML
 * Experience designing ADF pipelines, data flows, and integration runtimes for reliable, cost-optimized data ingestion
 * Ability to integrate data pipelines with AI/ML workflows using ADF, Azure ML, Databricks, or Synapse ML

Data Integration & APIs

 * Experience ingesting data from diverse sources: marketing platforms (Meta Ads, Google Ads, GA4), CRMs (Salesforce), analytics tools (BigQuery), REST APIs, sFTP, and file-based systems
 * Skilled in troubleshooting pipelines, implementing triggers, automated alerts, and performance tuning

Data Modeling & Quality

 * Strong knowledge of conceptual, logical, and physical data modeling for transactional and analytical systems
 * Practical experience with normalization, denormalization, and tools like ER/Studio, Erwin, or SQL Power Architect
 * Ability to design and maintain data quality frameworks, including profiling, validation, and cleansing strategies

Engineering Practices

 * Advanced SQL for querying, managing, and optimizing cloud databases
 * Solid CI/CD experience: branching strategies, Git version control, automated deployments
 * Demonstrated ability to enforce coding standards, conduct code reviews, and lead testing (unit, integration, regression)

Governance & Compliance

 * Experience establishing data standards, naming conventions, metadata management, and data lineage practices
 * Familiarity with regulatory and contractual compliance requirements relevant to client engagements




EXPERIENCE & REQUIREMENTS

Area

Experience: 8–10 years in cloud data engineering, covering cloud data warehousing and data lakes, ETL/ELT pipeline development, SQL and data modeling (conceptual/logical/physical), Azure stack (Data Factory, Synapse, Databricks, Azure SQL, Data Lake/Delta Lake), data governance (MDM, metadata, data lineage, data quality), and exposure to AI/ML data pipelines.

-Must be able to work within US time zones

INTERPERSONAL & LEADERSHIP SKILLS

 * Outstanding written and verbal communication skills; ability to build rapport quickly with clients, leadership, and cross-functional teams
 * Proven collaboration across diverse, fast-moving teams in a startup-paced environment
 * Ability to conduct detailed requirements gathering and translate client objectives into actionable technical plans
 * Strong ownership mindset guiding stakeholders through complex processes with clear communication
 * Experience mentoring and coaching team members, supporting their professional growth
 * Comfortable presenting complex technical concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences

Location: Pulchowk Lalitpur

Reports To: Head of Engineering / CTO

Employment Type: Full-time
title: Senior Cloud Data Engineer

description:
Company Description



Palm Mind AI specializes in delivering customized AI and machine learning solutions to meet the unique requirements of our diverse clientele. With over six years of experience, we have become trusted partners for startups and enterprises across more than 10 industries globally. Our services include developing full-stack AI systems, seamlessly integrating third-party platforms, and providing expert team augmentation to facilitate innovation and scalability. Our mission is to offer cost-effective, scalable solutions that bring AI visions to life.




Role Description



This is a full-time, on-site role based in Kathmandu for a Senior AI Engineer at Palm Mind AI. The Senior AI Engineer will be responsible for designing and developing advanced AI/ML algorithms and systems, implementing neural networks, enhancing natural language processing (NLP) models, and working on pattern recognition tasks. The role also includes collaborating with cross-functional teams, evaluating new technologies, and contributing to software development processes for the integration of AI solutions into existing platforms.




Qualifications



 * Expertise in Machine Learning, Pattern Recognition, and Neural Networks
 * Strong background in Computer Science with experience in Software Development
 * Proficiency in Natural Language Processing (NLP) tools and techniques
 * Excellent problem-solving skills and ability to work collaboratively in a team
 * Master's degree or higher in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field
 * Experience with AI tools and frameworks such as TensorFlow, PyTorch, or similar
 * Proficiency in programming languages such as Python, Java, or C++
 * Strong understanding of data structures, algorithms, and application design principles
 * Previous experience in deploying scalable AI solutions in production environments is a plus
title: Senior Ai Engineer

description:
Position Overview:  

We are looking for a highly skilled Technical SME – Cloud to support our cloud presales and delivery. This role will act as a technical authority for multi-cloud solutions (AWS, Azure, GCP, Huawei, Tencent), working closely with sales, partners, and customers to design, present, and support scalable cloud architectures. The role also requires hands-on involvement in BOQ design, post-sales technical troubleshooting, and the ability to translate technical solutions into clear business value.




Roles and Responsibilities

Key Responsibilities:

Presales & Solution Design

 * Act as a technical presales lead for multi-cloud opportunities.
 * Design end-to-end cloud architectures based on customer requirements, including compute, storage, networking, security, backup, and DR.
 * Prepare solution documents, architecture diagrams, BOQs, and cost estimations.
 * Support RFPs, RFQs, and technical proposals with accurate and competitive solution designs.
 * Deliver technical presentations, demos, and solution walkthroughs to customers and internal stakeholders.




Post-Sales & Technical Support

 * Provide post-sales technical support and guidance during solution implementation.
 * Troubleshoot cloud-related issues and coordinate with OEMs or cloud providers when required.
 * Ensure solutions are aligned with best practices, security standards, and customer expectations.
 * Support handover to delivery or operations teams with clear documentation.




Cloud & Emerging Technologies

 * Maintain strong hands-on knowledge of multi-cloud services and cloud-native architectures.
 * Leverage Gen AI tools and cloud-based AI/ML services where applicable to enhance solutions and productivity.
 * Stay updated on new cloud services, pricing models, and industry trends.




Business & Stakeholder Collaboration

 * Work closely with sales teams to understand customer needs and align solutions with business objectives.
 * Provide technical inputs for pricing, margin analysis, and commercial structuring.
 * Build credibility and trust with customers as a technical advisor.
 * Collaborate with OEMs, cloud partners, and internal teams for solution validation and enablement.




Skills and Qualifications

 * Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, IT, Engineering, or a related field.
 * 3-5 years of experience in cloud engineering, presales, or technical solution design.
 * Relevant cloud certifications (AWS, Azure, or GCP Solutions Architect) are preferred.
 * Prior experience in a system integrator, cloud partner, or IT services organization.
 * Experience supporting enterprise or mid-market customers.
 * Hands-on exposure to multi-cloud or hybrid cloud environments is an added advantage.




Technical Skills

 * Strong knowledge of cloud computing concepts and architectures across multiple cloud platforms.
 * Experience with core cloud services that include compute, storage, networking, IAM, monitoring, and backup/DR solutions.
 * Ability to design BOQs and perform cloud cost estimations.
 * Exposure to Gen AI tools and cloud-based AI services is a strong advantage.
 * Understanding of security, compliance, and best practices in cloud environments.




Business Acumen

 * Understanding of how cloud solutions drive business value.
 * Ability to balance technical excellence with cost, scalability, and commercial viability.
 * Awareness of margin, pricing, and presales decision-making




Soft Skills

 * Excellent presentation and communication skills.
 * Strong problem-solving and analytical thinking.
 * Ability to explain complex technical concepts in simple business terms.
 * Good stakeholder management and collaboration skills.







What We Offer

 * Work in a multinational company operating in the Cloud & ICT domain,  based out of the UK and operating in Australia, India, Nepal, Pakistan, and Bangladesh
 * Best in class open, progressive, professional, and  equal opportunity work environment
 * Closely knit and supportive team members and a culture where your contributions, opinions, and diversity is welcome, respected, & encouraged 
 * Exposure to multi-disciplinary skill areas (including team management & leadership)  in a vibrant start-up ecosystem with deep work involving world-class leaders like Amazon, Microsoft, Google, Alibaba, DigitalOcean, and Facebook 
 * Opportunity to travel regionally (as part of assignment/ training and development or delivery ) in Nepal, India, Pakistan, Bangladesh, or Srilanka 




Our Commitments

We believe that diversity drives innovation. At Genese Solution, we are dedicated to creating a work environment where everyone, regardless of race, gender identity, age, religion, disability, or background, feels respected and included.

Interested candidates meeting the above criteria are requested to send their CV and cover letter to hr@genesesolution.com clearly mentioning the position you are applying for in the subject. 




NOTE: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further selection process.
title: Sr. Officer | Technical SME – Cloud

description:
We are looking for a skilled “Data Engineer” to design, build, and operate scalable data pipelines and cloud-native data platforms. You will work closely with analytics, product, and engineering teams to enable reliable reporting, analytics, and AI/ML use cases.




This role is hands-on and focused on building and owning production-grade data pipelines in Azure, with an emphasis on data quality, performance, and maintainability.




What You’ll Do




Data Pipelines & Processing

 * Design, develop, and maintain robust batch and near–real-time data pipelines.
 * Build and optimize ETL/ELT workflows for structured and semi-structured data.
 * Ingest data from multiple sources (databases, APIs, files, and cloud services).
 * Ensure pipelines are reliable, scalable, and easy to operate in production.




Data Modeling & Warehousing

 * Design and maintain data models for analytics and reporting (fact/dimension, star/snowflake schemas).
 * Build and optimize data warehouse / analytical datasets.
 * Partner with analytics and BI teams to deliver clean, well-documented datasets.




Cloud & Platform Engineering

 * Implement and manage workflows using Azure Data Factory (ADF) and Apache Airflow.
 * Deploy and manage data workloads using Azure Container Apps and Azure Function Apps.
 * Monitor pipelines, troubleshoot failures, and continuously improve performance and cost efficiency.
 * Apply best practices for cloud security, scalability, and cost management.




Collaboration & Quality

 * Work closely with analytics, product, and engineering teams to support business and AI/ML use cases.
 * Implement basic data quality checks, validation, and monitoring.
 * Document data pipelines, data models, and operational processes.




What We’re Looking For (Required Skills & Experience)

 * Strong understanding of data warehousing concepts (fact/dimension modeling, star and snowflake schemas).
 * Hands-on experience building and operating ETL/ELT pipelines.
 * Proficiency in Python and SQL (writing production-quality code and queries).
 * Experience working with large-scale datasets.
 * Solid experience with Azure data services, including:
 * Azure Data Factory (ADF)
 * Apache Airflow
 * Azure Container Apps
 * Azure Function Apps
 * Good understanding of cloud security, performance optimization, and cost management.
 * Strong problem-solving, debugging, and operational mindset.




Nice to Have

 * Experience with CI/CD for data pipelines.
 * Familiarity with data governance, data quality frameworks, or monitoring tools.
 * Experience supporting analytics, BI, or AI/ML workloads.
 * Exposure to infrastructure-as-code (Terraform, ARM, or similar).




What We Offer

 * Opportunity to work on modern, cloud-native data platforms.
 * Exposure to large-scale, real-world data problems.
 * A collaborative, growth-oriented engineering environment.
 * Ownership and influence over data architecture and best practices.




Interested candidates are requested to send in their cover letter and resume clarifying their work experience and expected salary to hrd@ycotek.com by February 22, 2026.




For more updates: Follow Ycotek in LinkedIn
title: Sr. Data Engineer

description:
Position Summary

Reasons You Will Want This Position


 * We are a rapidly growing company with limitless career growth and advancement for top performers
 * Our culture appreciates and rewards creative ideas,especially those that achieve better outcomes for everyone
 * Work with a team of talented technology professionals who will challenge and help you perform at your best
   
   

Summary

Cedar Gate Technologies is looking for a Systems Opns Engineer with strong experience in cloud infrastructure, DevOps practices, and system automation in the infrastructure department. They will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining scalable and reliable infrastructure solutions to support our cloud-based applications and services. Additionally, they will play a critical role in managing deployments and releases, incident handling, monitoring, and ensuring the stability, performance, and security of our platform.

Roles & Responsibilities


 * Design and implement scalable and resilient infrastructure solutions on cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
 * Automate infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, and deployment workflows using tools like Ansible, Terraform, and Jenkins
 * Coordinate and manage deployments and releases, ensuring smooth and reliable delivery of features and updates to production environments
 * Perform day-to-day operations through predefined playbooks
 * Demonstrate a basic understanding of AI/ML concepts and how they integrate with cloud and DevOps platforms
 * Maintain 24/7 availability of AWS infrastructure, including monitoring, incident management, and on-call duties
 * Build pipelines to automate platform deployments (CI/CD) and ensure efficient release management
 * Secure the environment with robust IT security practices and updates
 * Implement backup and disaster recovery procedures to ensure data integrity
 * Monitor infrastructure, network, and resources to detect and resolve issues proactively
 * Handle and respond to incidents, troubleshooting and resolving technical issues to ensure system stability and uptime
 * Lead incident response efforts,identifying root causes, implementing fixes, and learning from incidents to improve future processes
 * Write Infrastructure as Code ( IaC ) using industry-standard tools and services
 * Collaborate with global teams to design optimal platform architecture
 * Perform other related tasks as necessary
   
   

Required Experience / Qualifications


 * Bachelor’s Degree (or equivalent) in a technical field such as Computer Science or Computer Engineering
 * 2+ years of relevant experience
 * Proficiency in cloud computing platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
 * Familiarity with cloud-based AI/ML services (e.g., AWS Bedrock, Amazon SageMaker, or equivalent services on other cloud platforms)
 * Strong scripting and automation skills using languages like Python, Bash, or PowerShell.
 * Solid understanding of cloud security best practices and shared responsibility models
 * Experience with containerization technologies like Docker and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes
 * Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools such as Jenkins, GitLab CI, etc.
 * Experience with Ansible, Terraform, Helm, and Git
 * Experience with incident handling, monitoring, deployments, and releases
 * Strong desire to learn and utilize technology effectively
 * Strong written and communication skills
 * Flexibility to work off hours if required (Morning/Evening/Night/Weekend)
 * Positive attitude and eagerness to learn new things
   
   

Your Future Working Environment

If you join Cedar Gate, you can make great ideas happen for some of the world's most dynamic companies. With broad global resources and deep technical know-how, we collaborate with clients to cultivate ideas and deliver results in the medical industry. Choose a career at Cedar Gate and enjoy an innovative environment where challenging and interesting work is part of daily life.

Next to our excellent terms of employment and fringe benefits, we invest in considerable resources to provide ongoing training that builds and extends professional, technical, and management skills in all areas. At Cedar Gate, you will operate in a professional environment where teamwork and innovation are immensely encouraged. Together with colleagues, you will work on high-impact projects for many dynamic companies.

About Cedar Gate

Cedar Gate enables payers, providers, employers, and service administrators to excel value-based care. Our unified technology and services platform enhance and automates data management activities to deliver employer and provider analytics, care management, and payment technology necessary to pursue every payment model and optimize performance in all lines of business. From primary care attribution to bundled payments to capitation, our platform is designed to improve clinical, financial, and operational outcomes for all.

Cedar Gate Services  Pvt. Ltd, Nepal, provides software research & development, data analytics, IT infrastructure management and various support services for Cedar Gate Technologies, USA. We employ 750+ professionals in our Sanepa office. For more information, visit company website at https://cedargate.com/ and follow our FB page at https://www.facebook.com/CGTNepal

Deadline for Job Application: February 5, 2026
title: Systems Opns Engineer 2

description:
About Fusemachines

Founded in 2013, Fusemachines is a global provider of enterprise AI products and services, on a mission to democratize AI. Leveraging proprietary AI Studio and AI Engines, the company helps drive the clients’ AI Enterprise Transformation, regardless of where they are in their Digital AI journeys. With offices in North America, Asia, and Latin America, Fusemachines provides a suite of enterprise AI offerings and specialty services that allow organizations of any size to implement and scale AI. Fusemachines serves companies in industries such as retail, manufacturing, and government.

Fusemachines continues to actively pursue the mission of democratizing AI for the masses by providing high-quality AI education in underserved communities and helping organizations achieve their full potential with AI.

The Role

We’re looking for a Project Management Manager to elevate our delivery operations and lead our growing project management team in Nepal. This role is ideal for someone who thrives at the intersection of process, people, and product execution someone who can bring structure, rigor, and leadership to fast-moving AI projects.

You’ll coach and empower a team of early-career Project Managers, ensuring clear visibility into progress, risks, and resourcing across all product pods. You’ll help define and standardize project management practices that enable Fusemachines to deliver products predictably, transparently, and at scale.

Key Responsibilities


 * Lead and coach the project management team to improve discipline, accountability, and delivery velocity
 * Define and standardize project management practices across Jira, Gantt charts, burndown reports, and sprint reviews
 * Build dashboards and visibility mechanisms for leadership to track progress, risks, and dependencies
 * Partner with engineering and product leadership to manage capacity planning, resource allocation, and bandwidth balancing
 * Drive escalation and risk management processes to resolve blockers quickly
 * Introduce and monitor key delivery KPIs — sprint velocity, burn rates, on-time delivery ratio, and milestone predictability
 * Collaborate with the Product team to align project tracking with roadmap outcomes and success metrics
 * Push for accountability and ownership within technical teams, ensuring commitments are realistic and transparent
 * Train and mentor PMs to grow from task-oriented coordinators into proactive delivery leaders
   
   

Ideal Experience & Qualifications


 * 6+ years of experience in project or program management, with at least 2 years in a leadership role
 * Proven experience managing complex software or AI projects across distributed teams
 * Strong understanding of Agile methodologies and tools (Jira, Confluence, burndown charts, Gantt charts, etc.)
 * Demonstrated success in improving delivery visibility and process maturity across teams
 * Technical fluency — able to communicate effectively with engineers and challenge assumptions when needed. Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills
 * Experience mentoring or leading junior project managers
 * Prior exposure to AI, ML, or data-driven product development preferred
   
   

Who You Are


 * A systems thinker with a bias for clarity and accountability
 * Assertive but collaborative — able to push for progress while maintaining strong team relationships
 * Detail-oriented and metrics-driven, with an instinct for uncovering inefficiencies
 * Passionate about building structure and empowering others to perform at their best
 * Success Metrics Improved delivery visibility and accuracy of project reporting
 * Reduction in project slippage and unplanned escalations
 * Increased PM maturity and process adoption across pods
 * Consistent and predictable velocity in product delivery
 * Clear resource allocation and utilization across engineering teams
   
   

Fusemachines is an Equal Opportunities Employer, committed to diversity and inclusion. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws.

title: Project Management Manager

description:
About Us:

reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE) is a real estate technology company developing an end-to-end commission-free homebuying platform. Utilizing the power of AI and an acquisition-led growth strategy, reAlpha’s goal is to offer a more affordable, streamlined experience for those on the journey to homeownership in the US and globally.

Why Join Us?

At reAlpha, we’re transforming real estate with AI technology. Our team’s excellence drives our success, and we need your expertise. Join us to be part of a culture that values integrity, speed, and growth, where your work sets new industry standards.

An important note: Data shows that men on average apply for a role if they meet 3/10 requirements while women often only do so if it’s 10/10. We strive to clearly define our roles and expectations and encourage you to apply if you believe the opportunity aligns well with your skills and experience, even if it's not a perfect match.

AI Engineer - Level 2

Job Responsibilities

Applied AI Engineering


 * Design, build, and maintain core model services that abstract and standardize access to LLMs and ML models across the organization.
 * Build and maintain RAG infrastructure as a reusable platform capability, including indexing, retrieval, reranking, and context assembly.
 * Own model performance tuning, including latency reduction, throughput optimization, and token efficiency.
 * Design and operate evaluation and benchmarking pipelines for LLMs and agentic systems (quality, latency, cost, safety)
 * Design, architect, and deploy AI agents and agentic systems to develop innovative AI solutions
 * Build voice-enabled AI agents with optimal latency, ensuring real-time processing capabilities
 * Build production-grade agentic solutions and conversational AI systems
 * Fine-tune language models and traditional ML models for specific use cases
 * Design and implement APIs for seamless integration of AI models into the product ecosystem
 * Perform exploratory data analysis on structured and unstructured datasets and present actionable insights to stakeholders
 * Stay engaged with the latest developments in AI research, emerging frameworks, and industry trends
   
   

Core Software Engineering


 * Design, architect, and maintain scalable backend systems to support AI-powered products
 * Collaborate with frontend engineers, product managers, and stakeholders to deliver complex features leveraging AI and data-driven insights
 * Architect and optimize data models across SQL and NoSQL databases, ensuring efficient storage and retrieval patterns
 * Design and maintain robust data processing pipelines, including orchestration of scheduled workflows and data transformations
 * Implement and optimize APIs with a focus on performance, scalability, data integrity, and security
 * Manage application deployment to cloud platforms through containerization
 * Conduct thorough code reviews, mentor junior engineers, and establish coding standards to maintain high-quality codebases
 * Troubleshoot and resolve complex technical issues, including performance bottlenecks and system optimizations
 * Communicate technical solutions effectively with clients and stakeholders, including presenting demos and technical proposals
 * Take ownership of features from conception to deployment, making informed architectural decisions and trade-offs
   
   

Job Requirements

AI Engineering


 * You have a deep understanding of how conversational agents and agentic systems are built from the ground up, with professional or personal project experience
 * You have strong familiarity with LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc.) and know how to leverage their capabilities for production-ready AI products
 * You have hands-on experience implementing RAG systems with vector databases (Qdrant, Pinecone, Weaviate, Chroma, FAISS) and understand advanced retrieval strategies
 * You have experience with modern AI agent frameworks such as OpenAI Swarm, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, PydanticAI, LiveKit Agents (Voice), or CrewAI (at least one required)
 * You understand AI agent design patterns, context management strategies, and prompt engineering best practices
   
   

ML Foundations


 * You possess a strong understanding of AI/ML fundamentals including supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning techniques
 * You have knowledge of model fine-tuning, evaluation frameworks, and performance optimization techniques
 * You are proficient with data manipulation, cleansing, and preprocessing using numpy and pandas
 * You can create insightful data visualizations using matplotlib or similar tools
   
   

Software Engineering


 * You have in-depth knowledge of Python with experience on medium to large-scale projects
 * You are proficient in backend frameworks: FastAPI, Flask, or Django
 * You have strong API design skills with best practices for RESTful and GraphQL interfaces
 * You can write complex SQL queries and manage PostgreSQL databases efficiently
 * You have experience deploying backend systems to cloud platforms (AWS, Azure) using Docker and Kubernetes
   
   

Core Attributes


 * You possess excellent communication skills in English with confidence in presenting work to stakeholders
 * You have a product-oriented mindset—thinking beyond tickets to understand business objectives behind the software
 * You are open to giving and receiving constructive feedback
 * You take self-driven initiative without waiting for direction
   
   

Experience Requirements


 * Minimum of 2-3 years of professional experience in AI/ML engineering, backend engineering, or related roles
 * Demonstrated experience shipping AI features or products to production
   
   

reAlpha is an equal opportunity employer, and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability status, genetics, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, or any other characteristic protected by federal, state or local laws. reAlpha is committed to sponsoring work visas for exceptional employees and following all immigration laws.

description:
We are looking to recruit an Application Support & Implementation Engineer who will provide high-level onsite and remote IT technical liaison.

The Application Support & Implementation Engineer will be responsible for the full life-cycle of incidents and problems. The position will require close working with all teams in all levels of technical support and engineering.

Responsibilities


 * Implement and install solutions on the customer's test and production environments
 * Work onsite and offsite to troubleshoot and diagnose customer reported issues on the different levels of solutions (i.e. Database, Application, Network, Communication, and Integration Interfaces Levels)
 * Act positively and respond promptly to the customer's requests/tickets
 * Prepare, review and ensure accuracy of technical documentation
 * Conduct Preventive / Corrective Maintenance visits to customer sites physically or remotely
 * Perform any other job-related duties incidental to the work
   
   

Requirements


 * Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology, Engineering/Science, Computer application or any related field
 * Fresh graduates / Up to 3 years' experience in a familiar field
 * Willing to travel abroad and work extra hours whenever needed
 * Knowledge in database engines (Oracle and MS-SQL)
 * Basic knowledge in operating systems (Linux and MS Windows)
 * Knowledge in application servers (Tomcat, WebLogic, and WebSphere)
 * Knowledge in Directory Services (AD & LDAP)
 * Excellent verbal, written, and interpersonal skills
 * Excellent team player
 * Excellent customer service skills
 * Attention to detail skills
 * Effective communication skills
   
   

Experience in one or more of below is a plus:


 * Cloud Computing, Virtualization Technologies, SAN and Storage, Network Infrastructure
 * Data Centers, High Availability & Disaster Recovery, Backup & Recovery Strategies
 * Knowledge in PKI Infrastructure and Certificate Authorities
 * Knowledge in database engines (PostgreSQL, MySQL, and NoSQL Databases)
 * Knowledge in server and client operating systems (Linux Distros, Windows)
 * Knowledge in web application servers (Jetty, Wildfly, JBoss).
 * Cloud-based Solution Infrastructure (Amazon, Azure, Google Cloud, DigitalOcean)
 * Cloud Infrastructure Tools (OpenStack, Kubernetes, S3, Docker)
 * DevOps Techniques and Skills including CI/CD
title: Support & Implementation Engineer

description:
Position Summary

Reasons You Will Want This Position


 * We are a rapidly growing company with limitless career growth and advancement for top performers
 * Our culture appreciates and rewards creative ideas,especially those that achieve better outcomes for everyone
 * Work with a team of talented technology professionals who will challenge and help you perform at your best
   
   

Summary

Cedar Gate Technologies is looking for a Systems Opns Engineer with strong experience in cloud infrastructure, DevOps practices, and system automation in the infrastructure department. They will be responsible for designing, implementing, and maintaining scalable and reliable infrastructure solutions to support our cloud-based applications and services. Additionally, they will play a critical role in managing deployments and releases, incident handling, monitoring, and ensuring the stability, performance, and security of our platform.

Roles & Responsibilities


 * Design and implement scalable and resilient infrastructure solutions on cloud platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
 * Automate infrastructure provisioning, configuration management, and deployment workflows using tools like Ansible, Terraform, and Jenkins
 * Coordinate and manage deployments and releases, ensuring smooth and reliable delivery of features and updates to production environments
 * Perform day-to-day operations through predefined playbooks
 * Demonstrate a basic understanding of AI/ML concepts and how they integrate with cloud and DevOps platforms
 * Maintain 24/7 availability of AWS infrastructure, including monitoring, incident management, and on-call duties
 * Build pipelines to automate platform deployments (CI/CD) and ensure efficient release management
 * Secure the environment with robust IT security practices and updates
 * Implement backup and disaster recovery procedures to ensure data integrity
 * Monitor infrastructure, network, and resources to detect and resolve issues proactively
 * Handle and respond to incidents, troubleshooting and resolving technical issues to ensure system stability and uptime
 * Lead incident response efforts,identifying root causes, implementing fixes, and learning from incidents to improve future processes
 * Write Infrastructure as Code ( IaC ) using industry-standard tools and services
 * Collaborate with global teams to design optimal platform architecture
 * Perform other related tasks as necessary
   
   

Required Experience / Qualifications


 * Bachelor’s Degree (or equivalent) in a technical field such as Computer Science or Computer Engineering
 * 2+ years of relevant experience
 * Proficiency in cloud computing platforms such as AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform
 * Familiarity with cloud-based AI/ML services (e.g., AWS Bedrock, Amazon SageMaker, or equivalent services on other cloud platforms)
 * Strong scripting and automation skills using languages like Python, Bash, or PowerShell.
 * Solid understanding of cloud security best practices and shared responsibility models
 * Experience with containerization technologies like Docker and container orchestration tools like Kubernetes
 * Experience with CI/CD pipelines and tools such as Jenkins, GitLab CI, etc.
 * Experience with Ansible, Terraform, Helm, and Git
 * Experience with incident handling, monitoring, deployments, and releases
 * Strong desire to learn and utilize technology effectively
 * Strong written and communication skills
 * Flexibility to work off hours if required (Morning/Evening/Night/Weekend)
 * Positive attitude and eagerness to learn new things
   
   

Your Future Working Environment

If you join Cedar Gate, you can make great ideas happen for some of the world's most dynamic companies. With broad global resources and deep technical know-how, we collaborate with clients to cultivate ideas and deliver results in the medical industry. Choose a career at Cedar Gate and enjoy an innovative environment where challenging and interesting work is part of daily life.

Next to our excellent terms of employment and fringe benefits, we invest in considerable resources to provide ongoing training that builds and extends professional, technical, and management skills in all areas. At Cedar Gate, you will operate in a professional environment where teamwork and innovation are immensely encouraged. Together with colleagues, you will work on high-impact projects for many dynamic companies.

About Cedar Gate

Cedar Gate enables payers, providers, employers, and service administrators to excel value-based care. Our unified technology and services platform enhance and automates data management activities to deliver employer and provider analytics, care management, and payment technology necessary to pursue every payment model and optimize performance in all lines of business. From primary care attribution to bundled payments to capitation, our platform is designed to improve clinical, financial, and operational outcomes for all.

Cedar Gate Services  Pvt. Ltd, Nepal, provides software research & development, data analytics, IT infrastructure management and various support services for Cedar Gate Technologies, USA. We employ 750+ professionals in our Sanepa office. For more information, visit company website at https://cedargate.com/ and follow our FB page at https://www.facebook.com/CGTNepal
