title: Social Media Officer

description:
About Fusemachines

Founded in 2013, Fusemachines is a global provider of enterprise AI products and services, on a mission to democratize AI. Leveraging proprietary AI Studio and AI Engines, the company helps drive the clients’ AI Enterprise Transformation, regardless of where they are in their Digital AI journeys. With offices in North America, Asia, and Latin America, Fusemachines provides a suite of enterprise AI offerings and specialty services that allow organizations of any size to implement and scale AI. Fusemachines serves companies in industries such as retail, manufacturing, and government.

Fusemachines continues to actively pursue the mission of democratizing AI for the masses by providing high-quality AI education in underserved communities and helping organizations achieve their full potential with AI.

The Role

We’re seeking a Senior Product Marketing Manager who can turn complex AI products into clear, compelling stories that resonate with U.S. enterprise audiences.

This is a hands-on individual contributor role for someone who thrives at the intersection of strategy, storytelling, and GTM execution. You’ll develop messaging frameworks, write copy, manage collateral creation, and ensure every asset — from pitch decks to videos — tells a cohesive narrative about the value our AI products deliver. You’ll collaborate closely with product, design, video, and lead-gen teams to bring our products to market effectively, and help refine our ICPs, positioning, and competitive understanding.

Key Responsibilities


 * Develop and maintain product messaging frameworks, value propositions, and ICP definitions for Fusemachines’ AI product portfolio
 * Lead competitive and market research, translating insights into positioning, collateral updates, and GTM strategies
 * Write, edit, and manage content for sales decks, landing pages, brochures, case studies, and videos
 * Partner with design and video teams to ensure all materials convey a unified story and visual identity
 * Support the VP of Product in GTM planning, campaign preparation, and enablement initiatives
 * Collaborate with lead-gen and sales teams to ensure alignment between product narrative, campaigns, and buyer journeys
 * Participate in product discovery and feedback loops to continuously evolve messaging and validate resonance
   
   

Ideal Experience & Qualifications


 * 5+ years of experience in product marketing, content marketing, or GTM strategy, ideally in SaaS or AI/tech sectors
 * Proven ability to write and edit high-impact content for U.S. enterprise audiences — portfolio or samples required
 * Strong storytelling skills with an analytical mindset; capable of translating technical features into business value
 * Experience working cross-functionally with product, design, and marketing teams
 * Strong familiarity with B2B GTM processes, buyer personas, and funnel stages
 * Excellent English fluency, both written and verbal
   
   

Who You Are


 * A creative storyteller who understands enterprise buyers and technical audiences alike
 * Highly collaborative and self-driven — able to bring GTM assets from idea to launch with minimal supervision
 * Detail-oriented and structured, with the ability to manage multiple deliverables and deadlines
 * Passionate about learning complex products and simplifying them for real business impact
 * Success Metrics On-time delivery of GTM collateral and campaigns
 * Improved clarity and consistency across product messaging
 * Measurable engagement with content (CTR, meetings booked, etc.)
 * Strong collaboration scores from product and sales stakeholders
   
   

Fusemachines is an Equal Opportunities Employer, committed to diversity and inclusion. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or any other characteristic protected by applicable federal, state, or local laws.

title: Sales and Marketing Officer

description:
Type: Full-Time

Experience Level: Senior (5+ Years)

Location: Gaushala, Kathmandu




Role Overview

We are looking for a Senior SEO Specialist who views search engines as a puzzle and AI-driven discovery as a playground. You won’t just be "optimising keywords"; you will be architecting a holistic organic presence that spans traditional search, AI Overviews (SGE), and emerging discovery platforms.

The ideal candidate understands that SEO in 2026 is about Authority and Trust, not just backlinks and meta-tags. You’ll lead our organic strategy, ensuring our brand remains the definitive answer to our customers' most pressing questions.




Key Responsibilities
 * AI & SGE Strategy: Optimise content for AI-driven search results and LLM-based discovery to ensure our brand is cited as a primary source.
 * Technical SEO Excellence: Conduct deep-dive audits on site architecture, focusing on Interaction to Next Paint (INP), schema markup, and crawl efficiency for massive datasets.
 * Content Ecosystem Leadership: Collaborate with the content team to implement E-E-A-T (Experience, Expertise, Authoritativeness, Trustworthiness) at scale, moving beyond "SEO writing" to "Expert-led insights."
 * Competitive Intelligence: Use predictive analytics to stay ahead of algorithm shifts and competitor moves before they impact our traffic.
 * Data Orchestration: Build custom dashboards in Looker Studio or BigQuery to merge SEO data with actual business revenue, proving that organic growth is a profit center, not just a vanity metric.




Requirements & Tech Stack
 * Experience

5+ years in SEO with a proven track record of growing organic revenue (not just traffic).

 * Technical Skills

Proficient in Python or SQL for data analysis; advanced knowledge of JavaScript SEO.

 * Tools

Semrush/Ahrefs, Botify/Screaming Frog, Google Search Console, and AI-auditing tools.

 * Strategic Mindset

Ability to translate "we dropped in rankings" into a multi-departmental recovery plan.

 * Communication

You can explain the "why" behind a Core Update to a CEO without using jargon.




What Makes You the Perfect Fit?

"You don't just follow the Google documentation; you read between the lines. You understand that SEO is a long game, but you have the tactical chops to find 'quick wins' in a crowded digital marketplace."

 * You are comfortable working alongside developers to implement complex redirects or headless CMS optimisations.
 * You have a "test and learn" mentality, frequently running A/B tests on titles and schema to see what actually moves the needle.
 * You stay calm when the algorithm shifts because your strategy is built on user value, not loopholes.

title: SEO Specialist

description:
We’re looking for an experienced and strategic Senior SEO Specialist to lead and scale our organic search performance. You’ll take ownership of SEO strategy and execution—ensuring our websites are technically strong, well-optimised, and consistently driving high-quality organic traffic.

You’ll work closely with content, marketing, and leadership teams to align SEO initiatives with business goals and deliver measurable results.




Responsibilities

 * Lead and execute end-to-end SEO strategy aligned with business objectives.
 * Conduct technical SEO audits and implement improvements (site speed, indexing, crawlability, schema, Core Web Vitals).
 * Manage on-page SEO including site structure, metadata, internal linking, and content optimisation.
 * Own off-page SEO initiatives such as link-building strategy, backlink audits, and outreach oversight.
 * Perform keyword research and competitor analysis to identify growth opportunities.
 * Collaborate with content teams to guide SEO-focused content planning and optimisation.
 * Optimise blogs, landing pages, and key pages for search performance and conversions.
 * Monitor, analyse, and report performance using Google Search Console, Google Analytics, and SEO tools.
 * Deliver clear monthly and quarterly SEO reports with actionable insights.
 * Stay updated with SEO trends, algorithm updates, and industry best practices.
 * Support Google Ads optimisation and landing page performance when required.
   

Requirements

 * Minimum 4 years of proven experience in SEO strategy and execution.
 * Strong expertise in technical SEO and website optimisation.
 * Hands-on experience with tools like SEMrush, Ahrefs, Screaming Frog, or similar.
 * Excellent knowledge of Google Search Console and Google Analytics.
 * Ability to translate data into clear, actionable insights.
 * Solid understanding of content marketing and SEO alignment.
 * Experience managing high-quality, ethical link-building strategies.
 * Working knowledge of Google Ads and integrated search strategies.
 * Strong communication skills and results-driven mindset.
   

Nice to Have

 * Experience with WordPress, Shopify, or similar CMS platforms.
 * Familiarity with AI-driven SEO tools and automation.
 * Knowledge of local SEO, international SEO, or AI-influenced search strategies.
 * Experience mentoring or guiding junior SEO team members.




To apply: please send your updated cv to job@talentsathi.com, we will fast track the application process.

title: Digital Marketing Executive

description:
Job Summary

The Digital Marketing Specialist is responsible for planning, executing, and optimizing all digital marketing initiatives to drive brand growth, lead generation, and customer engagement. This role leads the marketing team, collaborates with internal departments, and supports the Business Development Manager by leveraging data-driven insights and innovative strategies.

Key Responsibilities

I. Digital Marketing Campaigns


 * Plan, execute, and manage digital marketing campaigns including SEO, SEM, email marketing, social media, PPC, and display advertising.
 * Create and publish original, high-quality content focused on promotions and SEO enhancement.
 * Develop and oversee online banner advertisements and PPC ad management.
   
   

II. Strategy & Optimization


 * Identify digital marketing trends and insights to optimize campaign spend and performance.
 * Brainstorm and implement innovative growth strategies to boost digital presence and customer acquisition.
 * Provide data-driven recommendations to improve website rankings, traffic, and other key performance indicators.
 * Ensure cost-effective marketing plans within approved budgets.
   
   

III. Team Leadership & Collaboration


 * Supervise and mentor the marketing team to ensure quality output and alignment with business objectives.
 * Collaborate with internal teams to create and optimize landing pages and enhance user experience across channels.
   
   

IV. Analytics & Reporting


 * Utilize strong analytical skills to evaluate end-to-end customer experience across multiple channels and touchpoints.
 * Track and analyze digital campaign performance, making adjustments as needed to maximize ROI.
   
   

V. Research & Development


 * Evaluate emerging digital marketing technologies and provide thought leadership on adoption.
 * Conduct research to identify potential clients and support outreach efforts in coordination with the Business Development team.
   
   

Knowledge, Skills And Abilities


 * Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Business, Communications, or a related field; a Master’s degree is a plus.
 * Professional certifications in digital marketing, SEO, Google Ads, or analytics are highly desirable.
 * Minimum 3–5 years of proven experience in digital marketing, preferably with campaign management and team supervision.
 * Strong knowledge of SEO, SEM, PPC, email marketing, social media platforms, and digital advertising tools.
 * Proficiency with digital analytics tools and CRM systems.
 * Excellent content creation skills with a good understanding of SEO best practices.
 * Strong analytical and data interpretation skills to optimize campaigns and improve KPIs.
 * Ability to lead and mentor a marketing team, manage multiple projects, and collaborate across departments.
 * Creative mindset with the ability to develop innovative marketing strategies and growth initiatives.
 * Strong communication, presentation, and interpersonal skills.
 * Ability to adapt quickly to emerging digital trends and technologies.
 * Detail-oriented, organized, and able to work independently under deadlines.
   
   

Benefits


 * Competitive salary with an attractive benefits package.
 * Lunch allowance and performance-based incentives.
 * Dynamic, supportive, and growth-oriented work environment.
 * Ongoing professional development and career growth opportunities.

description:
JOB DESCRIPTION: MARKETING MANAGER

Job Title: Marketing Manager

Designation: Marketing Manager

Reports to: Director of Commerce

Location: Chandol, Kathmandu, Nepal

Shift: Standard (09:00 AM to 05:00 PM) from Sunday to Friday

Position Overview

The Marketing Manager is responsible for developing, implementing and executing strategic marketing plans for an entire organization to attract potential customers and retain existing ones. S/he should have hands-on experience with web analytics tools and be able to turn creative ideas into effective advertising projects. This position requires strong communication skills, creativity, and the ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment.

Roles And Responsibilities

Develop and Implement Strategy:


 * Work directly with senior management of the organization to develop marketing programs, design marketing strategies, and implement marketing campaigns.
 * Provide leadership and direction in the development, implementation, and monitoring of the strategic marketing plan for the organization.
 * Develop and manage annual marketing budgets for the organization, regularly monitor expenditures; prepare summary assessments and reports.
 * Provide leadership in developing and designing and the production of all parts of marketing needs.
 * Establish and implement short and long-range marketing goals, objectives, policies, and procedures for the organization.
   
   

Digital Marketing


 * Develop and implement the company's social media strategy and maximize profile across all activities.
 * Plan and execute all digital marketing, including SEO/SEM, marketing, database, email, social media, and display advertising campaigns.
   
   

Promotion And Branding


 * Oversee all promotional events of the organization
 * Initiate and implement direct outreach marketing efforts to potential external customers.
 * Design, develop, and own all marketing materials of the company, including but not limited to product packaging materials, banners, booth and stall designs, brochures, and other brand collaterals.
 * Develop and implement internal branding initiatives to strengthen company culture, employee engagement, and alignment with the organizationâ€™s brand values.
   
   

Market Research


 * Identify potential new markets and creating a plan to enter the market
 * Review current marketing campaigns for weaknesses and develop solutions within budget constraints
   
   

Coordination And Supervision


 * Oversee, train, and direct the marketing team.
 * Partnering with product development to estimate product demand.
 * Coordinate with the sales team and other departments to produce effective strategies
   
   

Skills And Qualifications

Task Related


 * Bachelor's degree in marketing, Business Administration, or a related field.
 * 4 or more years of experience in marketing or a similar role.
 * Experience in digital marketing and content creation is preferred.
   
   

Competencies And Soft Skills


 * Strong written and verbal communication skills.
 * Creative thinking and problem-solving abilities.
 * Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment.
 * Excellent organizational and time-management skills.
 * Analytical mindset and ability to interpret data.
 * Strong attention to detail.
 * Ability to multitask and prioritize effectively.
 * Adaptability and willingness to embrace new marketing trends.
 * Passion for marketing and staying updated with industry developments.
title: Marketing Manager

description:
Are you an analytical thinker with a passion for advertising? Blys is on the lookout for a talented Paid Ads Specialist to help elevate our digital marketing efforts!

With our commitment to delivering wellness through technology, we are a rapidly growing startup focused on connecting customers with top-tier wellness professionals. As the #1 on-demand booking platform for wellness services in different countries, we have an incredible opportunity for you to make a direct impact on our growth trajectory.

Requirements

About you


 * Minimum of 3 years of experience in managing paid social and search campaigns, preferably in a digital marketing role
 * Proficient in Google Ads, Facebook Ads Manager, and analytics tools such as Google Analytics
 * Strong knowledge of SEM, SEO, and conversion rate optimisation best practices
 * Excellent analytical skills with the ability to translate data into actionable insights
 * Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment
 * Strong communication skills, with the ability to convey complex ideas in an accessible way
 * A creative mindset with the ability to develop compelling advertising ideas and concepts
 * Detail-oriented with an emphasis on quality and accuracy in execution
   
   

Benefits

Why Join Us?

At Blys, you'll be part of a mission-driven company that is transforming the wellness industry. We offer competitive compensation, an innovative work environment, and opportunities for professional development.

If you're ready to bring your expertise to a vibrant team and make a difference, we'd love to hear from you!

Why you should join Blys


 * Fast-growing and exciting start-up with excellent growth opportunities
 * Mission-led company - we want to change the world!
 * World-class team - be part of a young and dynamic team of A+ players
 * Rewarding work - interesting & challenging problems to solve
 * Fun & open culture - we love having fun, learning new things and helping each other excel
 * Positive company outlook - well-funded, profitable and growing fast
 * Significant influence on company direction and performance - working closely with an experienced team
 * Competitive remuneration package
 * Balanced work hours
 * Advance Salary/ Employee Loan policy
 * Five-day work week
 * Fun team events including company trips
 * A chance to make a real IMPACT on 200,000+ actual customers - your work will change lives!
   
   

Our hiring process is:


 * Review of your application
 * Assessment
 * Initial Interview
 * Final Interview
 * Offer
 * Formalise with a permanent full-time contract and welcome you to Blys!

description:
This Digital Marketing Specialist role involves handling multiple client accounts, creating content strategies, running ads, and maintaining strong client communication. The ideal candidate is highly organized, creative, and able to execute content, ads, and campaigns end-to-end.

Act as the first point of contact with clients to understand requirements, goals, and expectations

description:
About The Role

We’re looking for a creative, results-driven Digital Marketing Team Lead to manage and execute high-impact marketing campaigns across digital and offline channels. This is an in-office role for someone who thrives in fast-paced environments, can juggle multiple projects, and builds strong processes that keep the team moving efficiently.

Key Responsibilities


 * Lead planning and execution of multi-channel campaigns (digital + offline).
 * Manage multiple projects simultaneously with clear timelines and priorities.
 * Oversee social media strategy, content calendars, and engagement growth.
 * Collaborate with internal and cross teams on brand-aligned assets.
 * Launch and optimize paid ad campaigns (Google, Meta) and support SEO efforts.
 * Track performance metrics, report results, and refine strategy accordingly.
 * Build efficient workflows and mentor the team
   
   

What We’re Looking For


 * 2+ years of digital marketing experience, with 1 year in a team lead role.
 * Strong grasp of content marketing, social media, SEO, and paid media.
 * Experience managing projects and collaborating across teams.
 * Familiar with tools like Google Analytics, Meta Ads Manager, and HubSpot.
 * Great communicator with a proactive and hands-on approach.
   
   

Why Join Us?


 * Opportunity to lead impactful campaigns in a fast-paced environment.
 * Creative freedom, collaborative team culture, and room to grow.
 * In-office role with a chance to shape the marketing direction of the brand.
